However, these and other existing methods overlook two structural obstacles in candidate tracking graphs: (i) cell divisions entangle distinct lineage paths in the node embedding space, and (ii) edges sharing a node have near-random label agreement, so the candidate-graph topology carries no useful information for graph neural networks to aggregate. We propose the \textbf{Higher-Order Cell Tracking Transformer} (HOCT), an edge-centric architecture in which candidate cell links attend to one another under a 3D geometric prior, resolving both issues. Evaluated on the Cell Tracking Challenge and a bacteria division benchmark, HOCT achieves state-of-the-art results without deep pre-trained image encoders. Moreover, the proposed approach is easier to fine-tune, quickly reducing tracking errors by 59% with 400 annotations in a human-in-the-loop setting, outperforming LoRA fine-tuning of competing transformer baselines (6.75% improvement).

</details>


### [179] [StoryTeller: Training-Free Narrative Grounding for Long-Form Audio Description](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11798)
*Seung Hyun Hahm,Minh T. Dinh,SouYoung Jin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: StoryTeller是一个无需训练的故事感知长视频音频描述框架，通过维护经过验证的叙事记忆来跨场景保持故事连贯性，在无需字幕、脚本等额外信息的情况下，显著提升了长视频描述的叙事连贯性和事实准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视频语言模型在处理长视频音频描述时，往往独立处理每个时刻，导致缺乏角色身份、事件意义以及场景间叙事连贯性，无法满足盲人和低视力观众对完整故事理解的需求。

Method: StoryTeller维护一个经过验证的叙事记忆库，跨场景传递故事相关信息；可选的公共电影元数据检索用于解析名称和故事上下文，通过语义过滤和VLM验证仅接受视频支持的事实；无需字幕、脚本、AD转录、对齐字幕、角色库、预计算人脸身份或任务特定微调。

Result: 在标准AD基准测试和多样化的长视频上，StoryTeller在自动评估、QA评估和人工评估中，在叙事连贯性、事实准确性和故事理解方面持续优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: StoryTeller通过叙事记忆机制有效解决了长视频音频描述中跨场景的故事连贯性问题，为盲人和低视力观众提供了更完整、连贯、上下文丰富的音频描述。

Abstract: Long-form audio description (AD) requires more than describing visible actions: it must preserve characters, events, relationships, and story context across scenes so that blind and low-vision (BLV) audiences can follow a film. Modern video-language models (VLMs) are effective on short clips, but they often treat each moment independently, producing descriptions that miss who characters are, why events matter, and how the current scene connects to earlier narrative context. We propose StoryTeller, a training-free framework for story-aware long-form AD. Instead of relying only on local visual cues, StoryTeller maintains a verified narrative memory that carries forward story-relevant information across scenes, enabling later descriptions to remain coherent, grounded, and contextually informative. Given only raw video and a movie title, StoryTeller can optionally retrieve public movie metadata to resolve names and story context, while accepting only facts that are supported by the video through semantic filtering and VLM verification. The method requires no subtitles, scripts, AD transcripts, aligned captions, character banks, precomputed face identities, or task-specific fine-tuning. To evaluate whether generated AD preserves narrative information, we introduce StoryAD-QA, a question-answering benchmark that tests whether a language model can answer story-context questions using only the generated descriptions. Experiments on standard AD benchmarks and diverse long-form videos show that StoryTeller consistently improves narrative coherence, factual grounding, and story comprehension over strong baselines in automatic, QA-based, and human evaluations.

</details>


### [180] [MM-ToolSandBox: A Unified Framework for Evaluating Visual Tool-Calling Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11818)
*Kaixin Ma,Di Feng,Alexander Metz,Jiarui Lu,Eshan Verma,Afshin Dehghan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MM-ToolSandBox是一个面向视觉基础的工具调用智能体的基准测试与评估框架，包含500+工具、16个应用领域，支持多图像、多轮任务。评估12个模型发现最佳模型成功率不足50%，且大模型失败主因是视觉精度不足（53%）而非规划能力，小模型则主要失败于规划决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具调用智能体缺乏视觉理解能力（视觉-工具调用结合不足），以及缺乏支持多图像、多轮对话、状态变化的综合性评估框架。

Method: 构建包含500+工具、16个应用域的执行环境，设计自动化的场景生成流程（信息流引导规划+多阶段质量过滤），生成258个名义场景和50个UI变体场景，评估12个模型（4B到前沿商业模型）。

Result: 最佳模型成功率低于50%；53%失败源于图像信息提取错误；小模型失败于规划决策，大模型失败于视觉感知。

Conclusion: 当前模型缺乏稳健的视觉工具调用能力，视觉精度是大模型的主要瓶颈，不同规模模型的失败原因存在本质差异，需要针对不同能力水平的模型采取不同的研究改进方向。

Abstract: We introduce MM-ToolSandBox, a benchmark and evaluation framework for visually grounded tool-calling agents. The framework provides a stateful execution environment spanning 500+ tools across 16 application domains, supporting multi-image, multi-turn tasks where agents must ground progressively arriving visual inputs into executable tool calls while handling realistic conversational phenomena (goal revisions, error corrections, state mutations). An automated scenario generation pipeline produces diverse, visually grounded scenarios through information-flow-guided planning and multi-stage quality filtering, yielding 258 human-verified nominal scenarios and 50 variants targeting interactive UI applications. Evaluating 12 state-of-the-art models, from 4B open-weight to frontier proprietary systems, shows that current models still lack robust visual tool-calling capability: even the best model achieves below 50% success rate. Our failure analysis further reveals that visual precision, not only planning, is a primary bottleneck for capable models: 53% of failures stem from incorrect information extraction from images despite otherwise correct task workflows. A planning-to-precision crossover emerges with scale: smaller models fail at deciding what to do, while larger models fail at perceiving what they see, suggesting fundamentally different research directions for improving models at different capability levels. The framework and the benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/apple/ml-mmtoolsandbox

</details>


### [181] [MicroCharNet: Less is More for License Plate Character Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11830)
*Huy Che,Dinh-Duy Phan,Duc-Lung Vu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MicroCharNet，一个用于车牌字符检测的超轻量级模型，仅0.08M参数和0.096 GFLOPs，在UFPR-ALPR数据集上达到竞争性检测精度，并优于多个YOLO基线，适合边缘设备实时部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高精度车牌字符检测模型依赖大规模架构，计算开销大，难以部署于资源受限的边缘设备，因此需要设计兼顾精度与效率的超轻量级模型。

Method: 采用C2f块构建紧凑骨干网络，集成CoordAtt模块增强特征提取并保留空间信息；使用轻量级C3k2颈网络融合多级特征；采用单层无锚点检测头实现端到端预测。

Result: 在UFPR-ALPR数据集上，MicroCharNet仅0.08M参数和0.096 GFLOPs，检测精度优于多个YOLO基线，并在边缘设备上验证了实时部署效率。

Conclusion: 精心设计的超轻量级架构能有效平衡车牌字符检测的精度与效率，适合资源受限场景的实时应用。

Abstract: License plate character detection is a crucial component of intelligent transportation systems, where high accuracy and computational efficiency are required for real-time deployment. Although recent deep learning-based methods have substantially improved detection performance, many high-accuracy models rely on large-scale architectures that incur substantial computational overhead, limiting their applicability to resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we propose MicroCharNet, an ultra-lightweight model specifically designed for license plate character detection. The proposed architecture employs a compact backbone composed of C2f blocks, integrated with CoordAtt module to enhance feature extraction while preserving spatial information. A lightweight C3k2-based neck fuses multi-level features, followed by a single-level anchor-free detection head that enables end-to-end prediction. Experiments conducted on the UFPR-ALPR dataset demonstrate that MicroCharNet achieves competitive detection accuracy with only 0.08M parameters and 0.096 GFLOPs, while outperforming several recent YOLO-based baselines. Hardware-level evaluations further confirm its efficiency for real-time deployment on edge devices. These results indicate that carefully designed ultra-lightweight architectures can effectively balance accuracy and efficiency in license plate character detection. The source code is available at https://github.com/chequanghuy/MicroCharNet.

</details>


### [182] [Cycle-World: Mitigating Error Accumulation in Long-term Video World Models via Reverse-Prediction Cycle Consistency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11836)
*Zihan Su,Teng Hu,Jiangning Zhang,Ruiyan Wang,Ran Yi,Lizhuang Ma,Dacheng Tao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Cycle-World 提出了一种基于循环一致性的双阶段框架，通过在训练和推理阶段强制时间可逆性来抑制自回归扩散模型在长视频生成中的误差累积和生成漂移，在VBench基准上实现了60秒长视频生成的SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归扩散模型在长视频生成中存在误差累积问题：微小预测偏差随时间推移不断放大，导致生成漂移、结构坍塌和视觉质量严重退化。

Method: 提出Cycle-World框架，包含两个阶段：(1) 训练阶段引入反向预测模型，通过循环一致性目标将因果约束隐式嵌入前向生成器，强制生成可逆序列；(2) 推理阶段将冻结的反向模型用作运行时校正器，通过基于梯度的循环引导迭代优化生成表示，在误差存入历史上下文前主动抑制。

Result: 在VBench基准上，Cycle-World的双阶段协同策略显著缓解了误差漂移，在60秒长视频合成中实现了最优的整体生成质量和长时时间一致性。

Conclusion: 通过训练-推理双阶段的循环一致性约束，可以有效解决自回归扩散模型在长视频生成中固有的误差累积问题，证明了时间可逆性约束对生成稳定性的理论价值和实践有效性。

Abstract: Autoregressive diffusion models have enabled high-quality video generation, yet their sequential nature inherently suffers from error accumulation. In long-horizon video synthesis, minor prediction deviations compound over time, inevitably leading to unconstrained generative drift, structural collapse, and severe visual degradation. To address this, we propose Cycle-World, a novel framework designed for stable and temporally consistent long-video generation. Our approach tackles error drift by enforcing strict temporal reversibility across both the training and inference phases. Theoretically, we demonstrate that forward generative drift can be strictly bottlenecked by a cycle-consistency objective. During training, we integrate an efficient reverse-prediction model to implicitly embed causal constraints into the forward generator, compelling it to produce reversible sequences that tightly adhere to the natural video manifold. At inference time, we repurpose this frozen reverse model as a runtime corrector. Through gradient-based cycle guidance, it iteratively refines the generated latent representations, actively suppressing accumulated errors before they are committed to the historical context. Extensive experiments on the VBench benchmark demonstrate that Cycle-World's dual-phase synergy significantly mitigates error drift, achieving state-of-the-art overall generation quality and long-horizon temporal consistency in 60-second synthesis.

</details>


### [183] [HASTE: A Platform for Rapid Post-Disaster Building Damage Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11838)
*Caleb Robinson,Anthony Ortiz,Simone Fobi Nsutezo,Cameron Birge,Meygha Machado,Marcelo Duarte,Joaquin Rivero Rodriguez,Anthony Cintron Roman,Kevin White,Inbal Becker-Reshef,Juan M. Lavista Ferres*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HASTE是一个免代码的网页平台，允许非机器学习分析师利用灾后卫星图像快速生成逐栋建筑损伤图。它提供两种方法：一种是在单场景上训练小规模语义分割模型后对全图推理并映射到建筑足迹；另一种是利用预训练视觉模型嵌入每个足迹，分析师标注少量建筑后在浏览器中拟合逻辑回归快速评分其余建筑。基于xBD的初步实验表明，使用基础模型嵌入池化可仅依赖灾后图像将受损与完好建筑区分开来，性能匹配完全监督的ResNet-50基线但仅需其二十分之一的标签。自2023年以来，HASTE已在超过30次真实灾害响应中使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型灾害发生后，响应方需要在数小时内获得建筑损伤地图。现有的高性能模型依赖匹配的灾前/灾后图像以及从类似历史事件中采集的训练集，而新灾害发生第一天通常无法获得这两者。因此亟需一种不依赖灾前图像和预训练样本、且非机器学习工程师也能操作的方法。

Method: HASTE提供两种方法共享同一界面：方法一要求用户在灾后场景上标注多边形，训练一个针对该场景的小规模语义分割模型，运行全图分割后将逐像素输出与现有建筑足迹关联；方法二利用预训练视觉模型（基础模型）嵌入每个建筑足迹，用户仅需标注少量建筑，在浏览器中拟合逻辑回归，数秒内完成其余建筑的损伤评分。

Result: 在xBD数据集上的初步实验表明，使用基础模型嵌入池化可仅基于灾后图像区分受损与完好建筑，性能匹配完全监督的ResNet-50基线，但所需标签量仅为其二十分之一。自2023年以来，HASTE已支持超过30次真实灾害响应（涵盖地震、飓风、气旋、洪水、野火和龙卷风），在图像可用后数小时到数天内将结果交付给人道主义合作伙伴。

Conclusion: HASTE证明了一种免代码、无需灾前图像和大量标注数据的灾后建筑损伤快速评估方法是可行且有效的。未来最有前景的方向包括视觉-语言评估、主动学习以及道路等基础设施的损伤模型。HASTE已开源。

Abstract: When a large disaster strikes, responders need a map of which buildings are damaged within hours. The models that do well on public benchmarks assume matched before-and-after imagery and a training set drawn from similar past events, and neither is usually available for a new disaster in its first day. We present HASTE (High-speed Assessment and Satellite Tracking for Emergencies), a no-code web platform that lets analysts who are not machine learning engineers produce per-building damage maps from post-disaster satellite imagery. HASTE implements two methods that share one interface. The first requires the user to label polygons over the post-disaster scene, trains a small semantic segmentation model on that single scene, runs it over the whole image, and joins the per-pixel output to existing building footprints. The second embeds every footprint with a pretrained vision model, requires the user to label a handful of buildings, and fits a logistic regression in the browser that scores the rest of the scene in seconds. We describe the platform, both methods, and the engineering that supports them. We also report preliminary experiments on xBD showing that foundation-model embeddings pooled over footprints separate damaged from intact buildings using post-disaster imagery alone, matching a fully supervised ResNet-50 baseline with a twentieth of its labels. HASTE and its predecessors have supported more than thirty real-world disaster responses since 2023, spanning earthquakes, hurricanes, cyclones, floods, wildfires, and tornadoes, delivering results to humanitarian partners within hours to days of imagery becoming available. We close with the directions we think are most promising, including vision-language assessment, active learning, and damage models for roads and other infrastructure. HASTE is open source at https://github.com/microsoft/haste.

</details>


### [184] [LoRA-Based Cascaded Multimodal Fusion for Action Recognition in Medical Training Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11839)
*Divya Mereddy,Jeevan Beedareddy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于级联LoRA的多模态融合框架，用于医疗培训环境中的动作与活动识别。该框架通过参数高效的模态特定适配和顺序融合，逐步集成不同模态，无需重新训练已有组件。在NurViD和护士训练数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于单模态模型，且与现有数据集特定基线性能相当，为异构模态融合提供了一种参数高效的解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动作识别方法在医疗培训环境中面临多模态融合的挑战：固定融合结构无法灵活适配不同模态组合，且全参数微调成本高昂。作者希望提出一种可扩展、参数高效的级联融合策略，支持逐步集成异构模态而无需重训已有组件。

Method: 采用级联LoRA（Low-Rank Adaptation）融合框架：首先对每个模态进行参数高效的LoRA适配，然后通过顺序融合策略逐步整合模态——先融合相关性较高的模态，再引入其他异构模态。该架构支持跨不同模态组合的数据集的可扩展适配，无需固定融合结构。

Result: 在两个医疗培训环境数据集（NurViD和护士训练数据集）上评估。初步结果表明：级联融合策略优于单模态模型，且与之前报道的特定数据集基线方法相比具有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 级联LoRA融合是一种有前景的参数高效方法，适用于医疗培训动作与活动识别中的异构模态集成。代码已开源。

Abstract: This paper presents a cascaded Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)-based multimodal fusion framework for action and activity recognition in healthcare-oriented training environments. The proposed architecture combines parameter-efficient modality-specific adaptation with sequential fusion, enabling modalities to be integrated in stages without retraining previously learned components. Rather than assuming a fixed fusion structure, the framework first integrates more closely related modalities and then incorporates additional heterogeneous modalities, supporting scalable adaptation across datasets with different modality sets.We evaluate the framework on two healthcare-oriented training environment datasets: NurViD and the Nurse Training dataset. Across these datasets, preliminary results suggest that the proposed cascaded fusion strategy improves over individual modality models and provides competitive performance relative to previously reported dataset-specific baselines. Overall, these findings indicate that cascaded LoRA-based fusion is a promising parameter-efficient approach for integrating heterogeneous modalities in medical training action and activity recognition tasks. github: https://github.com/anonymous0-ai/LoRA-Based-Cascaded-Multimodal-Fusion-.git.

</details>


### [185] [Beyond the Single Camera: Agentic Multi-View Reasoning in Sports Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11844)
*Kerui Chen,Jinglu Wang,Xiaoyi Zhang,Yan Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SportMV-Bench基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型在多视角体育视频理解上的表现，并设计SportMV-Agent框架，通过主动视角选择、感知工具执行和基于证据的推理，显著提升了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLMs在单视角视频理解上表现良好，但体育视频存在密集遮挡、快速运动和复杂交互，单视角难以解决；实际体育赛事有多视角记录，但缺乏评估MLLMs多视角理解能力的基准。

Method: 构建SportMV-Bench基准（787个多视角视频包，2592个QA对，涵盖PAR、REI、ADR三类）；提出SportMV-Agent框架，包含主动视角选择、感知工具执行和证据推理的迭代循环。

Result: 当前MLLMs未能有效利用多视角信息，瓶颈在于细粒度视觉感知和视角选择，而非逻辑推理或领域知识；SportMV-Agent相比最强MLLM基线提升14.46%。

Conclusion: 多视角体育视频理解对现有MLLMs仍具挑战，SportMV-Agent通过主动视角选择与工具增强推理可显著提升效果。

Abstract: Recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on single-view video understanding benchmarks. However, sports videos involve dense occlusion, rapid motion, and complex interactions that are difficult to resolve from a single viewpoint. In practice, sports events are recorded from multiple camera angles, providing complementary evidence used by referees. Yet, no existing benchmark evaluates MLLMs on multi-view sports video understanding. To address this gap, we introduce SportMV-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark built from official match recordings, through a dedicated pipeline combining LLM-based generation, MLLM-based verification, and human filtering to ensure quality and consistency. SportMV-Bench containing 787 multi-view video bundles and 2592 question-answer pairs across three categories: Perception-Aware Recognition (PAR), Rule-aware Event Interpretation (REI), and Adjudicative Decision Reasoning(ADR). Our analysis shows that current MLLMs fail to effectively exploit multi-view information, with the bottlenecks lying in fine-grained visual perception and view selection rather than logical reasoning or domain knowledge. We propose SportMV-Agent, an agentic framework that orchestrates an iterative loop of active view selection, perception tool execution, and evidence-grounded reasoning, achieving a significant 14.46% relative improvement over the strongest MLLM baseline.

</details>


### [186] [Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11862)
*Shijie Wang,Honglu Zhou,Ziyang Wang,Ran Xu,Caiming Xiong,Silvio Savarese,Chen Sun,Juan Carlos Niebles*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出E-VQA任务，要求视频大语言模型同时输出语义答案和精确的时空证据（时间片段+密集跟踪分割掩码），构建了首个像素级时空证据基准ST-Evidence，并通过自动化流程生成160k规模数据集ST-Evidence-Instruct进行微调，在7B模型上实现+27.2 t-mean和+13.8 J&F的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Video LLMs在视频问答中缺乏可验证的视觉归因能力，现有的可解释性方法（文本解释或稀疏边界框）无法捕捉遮挡、非刚性变形等复杂视频动态。

Method: 定义E-VQA新任务（输出答案+时间片段+密集分割掩码）；构建ST-Evidence人工验证基准；开发自动化生成流程构建ST-Evidence-Instruct（160k规模）；使用该数据微调带像素级归因的Video LLMs。

Result: 评估发现QA准确率与真实视觉感知之间存在关键解耦，且单纯扩大规模无法弥合；微调后的模型在7B规模上相比UniPixel基线提升+27.2 t-mean和+13.8 J&F。

Conclusion: 该方法有效建立了可解释、有证据支持的视频理解基线，代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Current Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) excel in question answering (QA) but largely operate as black boxes, providing textual answers without verifiable visual grounding. Existing explainability efforts rely on textual rationales or sparse bounding boxes, which struggle to capture complex video dynamics such as occlusions and non-rigid deformations. We propose Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering (E-VQA), a novel task requiring models to jointly output a semantic answer and precise spatio-temporal evidence: temporal segments and dense, tracked object segmentation masklets. To support this, we introduce ST-Evidence, the first human-verified benchmark for both discriminative and generative pixel-level grounding. Evaluations of state-of-the-art models reveal a critical decoupling between QA accuracy and true visual perception that scaling alone fails to bridge. To address this, we develop scalable, automated generation pipelines to create ST-Evidence-Instruct, a 160k-scale dataset bridging high-level reasoning with fine-grained grounding. Fine-tuning grounded Video LLMs on this data yields substantial gains over the corresponding size-matched UniPixel baselines (e.g., +27.2 t-mean and +13.8 J&F on a 7B model), establishing a robust baseline for explainable, evidence-backed video understanding. Code and data are available at https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/EVQA.

</details>


### [187] [Latent-Identity Tuning in Text-to-Image Personalization Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11885)
*Daniel Garibi,Ronen Kamenetsky,Hadar Averbuch-Elor,Daniel Cohen-Or,Or Patashnik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出身份微调方法，利用预训练冻结编码器的潜在空间，无需额外训练即可对文本到图像个性化模型进行细粒度面部编辑，通过发现潜在语义方向实现局部化、精细且语义一致的编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于通用文本到图像模型的个性化和编辑方法缺乏细粒度面部编辑所需的精度，微小的修改可能显著改变人物的感知身份。

Method: 探索预训练冻结编码器的潜在空间，该空间由一组不同角色的潜在标记组成，对应特定的空间或语义面部区域；在该空间及选定标记定义的子空间中识别有意义的语义方向，实现局部化编辑。

Result: 定性和定量实验表明，该方法能实现多样化的局部面部编辑，同时保持跨图像的身份一致性。

Conclusion: 无需额外训练即可实现细粒度身份微调，在潜在空间中发现了可解释的语义方向，实现了精准的面部编辑。

Abstract: Generating and editing a person's face demands high precision, as even minor modifications can significantly alter a subject's perceived identity. Current personalization and editing methods built on general-purpose text-to-image models, however, often lack the precision required for fine-grained facial edits. We present a method for fine-grained identity tuning in text-to-image personalization models. Unlike standard image editing, which operates on a given image, identity tuning modifies the latent representation of a specific identity, enabling the generation of diverse images that consistently depict the same edited identity. To enable fine-grained latent identity tuning, we explore the latent space of a pre-trained, frozen encoder for text-to-image personalization. Our approach requires no additional training. Instead, it leverages the existing architecture of a frozen encoder to uncover latent semantic directions. This space consists of a set of latent tokens that play distinct roles in capturing different aspects of an identity and often correspond to specific spatial or semantic facial regions. We show that meaningful directions can be identified within this space and within subspaces defined by selected tokens, enabling localized, fine-grained, and semantically coherent edits. We validate our approach through qualitative and quantitative experiments that demonstrate diverse localized facial edits while preserving cross-image identity consistency. Project page at: https://garibida.github.io/IdentityTuning/

</details>


### [188] [Read It Back: Pretrained MLLMs Are Zero-Shot Reward Models for Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11886)
*Runhui Huang,Qihui Zhang,Zhe Liu,Yu Gao,Jie Wu,Hengshuang Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SpectraReward，一种免训练的奖励函数，通过计算生成图像条件下原始提示词的似然度来评估图像生成质量，无需偏好标签或奖励模型微调。进一步提出Self-SpectraReward，实现统一多模态模型的自闭环自我改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于MLLM的图像生成奖励函数需要人工偏好标签或额外微调，成本高昂且泛化能力有限。希望利用MLLM预训练的图像-文本对齐能力，构建无需训练的奖励函数。

Method: SpectraReward通过单次teacher-forced前向传播，计算生成图像条件下原始提示词的平均对数似然度作为奖励。Self-SpectraReward利用统一多模态模型中理解分支作为生成分支的奖励模型。

Result: 在两种扩散模型、三种RL算法、九个MLLM骨干网络（4B-235B参数）、五个OOD基准测试上的实验表明，该方法显著且一致地优于先前的MLLM衍生奖励训练方法。

Conclusion: 更大的奖励MLLM不一定更好，而Self-SpectraReward可以匹敌或超越更大的外部奖励模型，说明奖励-策略对齐是图像生成强化学习的关键因素。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose SpectraReward, a training-free reward function that turns pretrained MLLMs into off-the-shelf reward models for image-generation reinforcement learning. Instead of asking the MLLM to judge a generated image or answer decomposed verification questions, SpectraReward measures how well the original prompt can be recovered from the generated image through a single image-conditioned, teacher-forced forward pass. We use the average image-conditioned prompt log-likelihood as the reward, directly reusing the MLLM's pretrained image-text alignment ability without preference labels, reward-model fine-tuning. We further introduce Self-SpectraReward, a special case for unified multimodal models where the policy's own understanding branch serves as the reward model for its generation branch, forming a closed-loop self-improving framework without external reward models or external knowledge. Extensive experiments validate SpectraReward through a broad image-generation RL study covering two diffusion models, three RL algorithms, nine reward MLLM backbones from four MLLM families spanning 4B to 235B parameters, and five out-of-distribution text-to-image benchmarks. Results show that both SpectraReward and Self-SpectraReward significantly and consistently improve generation performance and outperform prior MLLM-derived reward training methods. Further analysis reveals that larger reward MLLMs are not always better, while Self-SpectraReward can match or surpass much larger external reward models, suggesting that reward-policy alignment is a key factor for effective image-generation RL. Project Page: https://huangrh99.github.io/SpectraReward/

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [189] [From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09664)
*Anca Marginean,Adrian Groza*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Toulmin论证模型分解ML视网膜诊断，利用生物标志物提取模型（grounds）、MedGemma医学知识代理（warrant）、定量评估（qualifier）和MedSigLip图像相似度（rebuttal）构建可解释诊断框架，辅助人类专家评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ML诊断结果缺乏结构化、可解释的评估机制，单纯依赖XAI方法或直接接受ML输出均不够充分，需要引入论证模型使诊断过程透明化。

Method: 采用Toulmin论证模型分解诊断：1）生物标志物提取模型提供grounds；2）MedGemma代理提供医学知识作为warrant连接grounds与claim；3）基于warrant和grounds的定量评估确定qualifier；4）MedSigLip计算图像相似度构建rebuttal。

Result: 形成了包含claim、grounds、warrant、qualifier、rebuttal的完整论证结构，所有组件呈现给人类专家，支持更明智和批判性的ML诊断评估。

Conclusion: 基于Toulmin模型的论证框架能有效提升ML诊断的可解释性和可信度，为人类专家提供结构化评估工具。

Abstract: To provide a structured and interpretable assessment, we decompose the image-based diagnosis into components following the Toulmin model of argumentation. This model consists of a claim, grounds, warrant, qualifier, rebuttal, and backing. Consider a claim generated by a machine learning (ML) model for retinal diagnosis. Rather than accepting this claim at face value, one could either apply explainable AI (XAI) methods or adopt an argumentation-based approach. In our framework, a model specialized in biomarker extraction from images provides the grounds. The warrant-linking the grounds to the claim - is analyzed by an agent equipped with medical knowledge; in our architecture, this role is fulfilled by a MedGemma agent. The qualifier is determined based on the overall quantitative evaluation of both the warrant and grounds models. Finally, a rebuttal is constructed using image similarity measures computed with MedSigLip. All these components are presented to the human expert, enabling a more informed and critical assessment of the ML-generated diagnosis.

</details>


### [190] [Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09665)
*Deep Pankajbhai Mehta*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文研究了提示包装器（prompt wrappers）因格式差异导致模型评分显著变化的问题，提出了格式敏感性指数（FSI）和可解析性敏感性指数（PSI）两个指标，通过14万次生成实验发现FSI跨模型差异超30倍，且可解析性是准确率的重要预测因子，建议报告准确率时应考虑包装器方差和合规性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提示包装器仅在格式上有差异，却能显著改变模型得分甚至翻转排行榜结论，但现有评估方法缺乏对这种方差的系统性量化与分析。

Method: 在token控制协议下进行实验，提出FSI和PSI两个互补指标；跨7个QA任务、5个包装器家族、4个指令模型（7B-72B参数）进行14万次OpenRouter生成；使用固定效应回归分析可解析性与准确率的关系。

Result: 平均FSI跨模型差异超过30倍，主要由合规性失败解释；固定效应回归显示即使在控制任务、模型和包装器后，可解析性仍是准确率的强预测因子。

Conclusion: 当前在报告准确率时不考虑包装器方差和合规性的做法在统计上是脆弱的；论文为基准测试和结构化输出部署提供了实用建议。

Abstract: Prompt wrappers often differ only in formatting, yet they can change model scores enough to flip leaderboard conclusions. We study this variance under a token-controlled protocol and introduce two complementary metrics: the Format Sensitivity Index (FSI), the accuracy range induced by wrapper choice, and the Parseability Sensitivity Index (PSI), the corresponding range in answer parseability. Across 140,000 OpenRouter generations spanning 7 QA tasks, 5 wrapper families, and 4 instruct models from 7B to 72B parameters, we find that mean FSI varies by over 30x across models and is largely explained by compliance failures. A fixed-effects regression shows that parseability remains a strong predictor of accuracy even after controlling for task, model, and wrapper. We argue that reporting accuracy without wrapper variance and compliance is statistically fragile, and we give practical recommendations for both benchmarking and structured-output deployments.

</details>


### [191] [Faithful, Not Corrective: Message-Format Effects in Multi-Hop Agent Relays Are Tier-Dependent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09678)
*Zayx Shawn*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过多跳中继实验发现，消息格式对LLM代理间信息传递的影响取决于中继能力：强中继下格式差异极小，弱中继下格式排序会翻转（JSON结构抗漂移但编码成本高），且注入错误后各格式均无法自我纠正——结构提供的是忠实、错误局部化的通道，而非纠错码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献对结构化消息的利弊存在分歧（格式优化派认为降低成本且不损准确率，格式限制派认为损害生成质量），且两者都未研究多跳场景下的复制保真度问题。

Method: 构建受控中继测试平台：12个程序生成的原子事实，在5种格式（自由NL、精确指导NL、JSON、三元组、键值对）下经6跳重编码，由固定强评分器对比程序化真实值打分，涵盖两种中继能力层级、认知负载条件和配对分叉错误注入。

Result: (i)强中继几乎无损，认知负载仅增加成本不影响保真度；(ii)弱中继下6跳召回率跨格式差异从2.3分扩大到20.5分，格式排序翻转由编码代价和JSON抗漂移两个机制驱动；(iii)注入错误后各格式83-100%持续到最终跳，且无附带损害。

Conclusion: 结构提供的是忠实、错误局部化的信道而非纠错码，格式选择应基于管道中最弱的中继环节。

Abstract: When LLM agents hand off information to one another, does the message format matter? Two literatures disagree: format-optimization work reports that structured messages cut cost without hurting accuracy, while format-restriction work finds that imposing structure degrades generation -- and neither measures what happens when a message traverses multiple hops, where copy fidelity, not one-shot generation, dominates. We introduce a controlled relay testbed: briefs of twelve programmatically generated atomic facts are re-encoded hop-by-hop in five formats (free NL, precision-instructed NL, JSON, triples, key-value) over six hops, scored by a fixed strong grader against programmatic ground truth, across two relay-capability tiers, a cognitive-load condition, and a paired-fork error injection. We find that message-format effects are tier-dependent. (i) Under faithful-relay instructions a strong relay is nearly lossless -- the documented "telephone-game" collapse does not occur -- and adding per-hop cognitive load leaves format-level fidelity unchanged (within +/-1.8 points) while raising generation cost by 24-53%. (ii) Under a weak (1.5B) relay the across-format spread of six-hop recall grows by a factor of 8.7 (from 2.3 to 20.5 points), driven by two opposing mechanisms -- an encoding toll paid by the rigid formats and drift resistance specific to the fixed-key JSON schema -- that flip the format ranking in transit. (iii) In a paired-fork injection, an injected wrong value, once present, persists to the final hop in 83-100% of chains in every format, closely matching each format's retention of the true value, with no detectable collateral damage to neighboring facts. Structure buys a faithful, error-localizing channel -- not an error-correcting code -- and format choice should follow the weakest relay in the pipeline.

</details>


### [192] [Boltzmann MapReduce: A Partition-Function Reduce for Forkable Sandboxes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09689)
*Yossi Eliaz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 在局部渐近正态性（LAN）下，工作者生成的置信密度是Gibbs-Boltzmann测度exp{-βE(θ)}，其中逆温度β等于样本量n。这导致三个结论：不重叠的数据块产生独立的玻尔兹曼因子，MapReduce的reduce操作对应配分函数Z=∫∏khk dθ，其众数是精度加权（逆方差）池化；频率学派的一致性对应零温极限T=1/n→0。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将分布式统计推断与统计力学建立形式化联系，揭示MapReduce框架下基于局部渐近正态性（LAN）的置信密度聚合的物理本质。

Method: 利用局部渐近正态性理论，将工作者在大小为n的数据块上输出的置信密度表示为Gibbs-Boltzmann测度，其中逆温度β等于样本量n，并通过统计力学中的配分函数概念解释MapReduce的reduce操作。

Result: 推导出三个精确结论：1）不重叠数据块的玻尔兹曼因子相互独立；2）MapReduce的reduce操作对应配分函数Z=∫∏khk dθ，其众数为精度加权（逆方差）池化；3）频率学派的一致性对应于零温极限T=1/n→0。

Conclusion: 在LAN框架下，分布式推断的置信密度聚合具有统计力学的严格对应，为理解MapReduce类分布式计算中的统计推断提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: To leading order under local asymptotic normality (LAN), the confidence density a worker emits over a chunk of size $n$ is a Gibbs--Boltzmann measure $\exp\{-βE(θ)\}$ whose inverse temperature is the sample size, $β=n$. Three consequences are exact in the Gaussian/linear case and first-order otherwise: disjoint chunks carry independent Boltzmann factors, so the MapReduce \emph{reduce}, read literally, is a partition function $Z=\int\prod_k h_k\,dθ$ whose mode is precision-weighted (inverse-variance) pooling; frequentist consistency is the zero-temperature limit $T=1/n\to0$

</details>


### [193] [Interpreting Latent CoT Reasoning as Dynamical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09698)
*Sabari Iyyappan Duraipandian,Shreya Sanjay Boyane,Manju Nagesh,Jerome Francis,Archana Vaidheeswaran,Kevin Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对隐式推理方法（CODI、COCONUT）在隐空间中进行多候选轨迹叠加导致可解释性不足的问题，提出了基于动力系统分析的框架，通过对隐层token序列进行轨迹建模，利用步进变化、方向一致性、Lyapunov敏感度等定量指标以及UMAP、DMD/PHATE等定性投影，揭示了隐式CoT具有结构化、非随机的动力学特性：CODI表现为稳定吸引子，COCONUT表现为不稳定扩张系统，SIM-CoT监督在不改变底层动力学的前提下强化了两种行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐式推理方法（CODI、COCONUT）存在根本的可解释性问题：它们在隐空间中同时维持多个叠加的候选推理轨迹，与显式CoT的单条透明推理链截然不同。现有机制分析方法仅能揭示压缩、捷径、叠加等现象，但无法解释推理如何在隐步之间演化。

Method: 将隐层token序列建模为表示空间中的轨迹，应用动力系统分析：采用步进变化（step-to-step change）、方向一致性（direction consistency）、Lyapunov敏感度等定量指标，并结合UMAP和DMD/PHATE等定性投影方法，对隐式CoT的推理演化进行刻画。

Result: 隐式CoT表现出结构化、非随机的动力学特性，存在两种不同的稳定性类别：CODI表现为稳定吸引子（stable attractor），COCONUT表现为不稳定扩张系统（unstable expanding system），SIM-CoT监督收紧两种行为但不改变底层动力学。

Conclusion: 该框架推进了隐式CoT推理动力学的可解释性，并为改进隐式推理性能提供了可操作的建议。

Abstract: Recent latent reasoning methods, such as CODI and COCONUT, face a fundamental interpretability problem: they maintain multiple superimposed candidate traces in the hidden space at each step, unlike explicit- CoT, which follows a single transparent reasoning trace. Existing mechanistic methods show compression, shortcuts, and superposition without explaining how reasoning evolves across latent steps. To address this gap, we model latent token sequences as trajectories in representation space and apply dynamical systems analysis to characterize the evolution of reasoning. Using quantitative measures, such as step-to-step change, direction consistency, and Lyapunov sensitivity, alongside qualitative projections, such as UMAP and DMD/PHATE, we show that latent CoT exhibits structured, non-random dynamics with two distinct stability classes. CODI behaves as a stable attractor, while COCONUT behaves as an unstable expanding system, and SIM-CoT supervision tightens both behaviors without changing the underlying dynamics. This framework advances the interpretability of latent CoT reasoning dynamics and provides actionable insights for improving latent reasoning performance. Code1 and Project page2 available online.

</details>


### [194] [YUKTI: From Natural-Language Situations to Robust, Verifiable Decisions An Uncertainty-Typed Proposition IR, Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers, and a Regret Certificate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09706)
*Suyash Mishra*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: YUKTI 提出了一种鲁棒的自动公式化方法，通过带类型命题图表示、分布帕累托传递和假设鲁棒帕累托前沿，将决策的遗憾降低 90% 以上，并证明 LLM 是公式化工具而非求解器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有管道（NL4Opt, OptiMUS, ORLM, OR-LLM-Agent）将情境转化为单一目标和点值系数后单次求解，这在分配真实预算、精力或临床注意力时是失败模式——每个客观化的数字都是假设，仅在猜测完全正确时最优的计划是脆弱的，仅是对计算的模仿。

Method: YUKTI 改变自动公式化的目标，其表示是带类型命题图，关系携带形状先验、系数不确定性和来源。每个阶段路由到精确/非线性/进化求解器；通过分布帕累托传递耦合阶段；引入假设鲁棒帕累托前沿（ARPF），通过重采样假设（包括结构 epsilon-污染）评估每个动作的生存频率 rho。证明了 rho 是决策遗憾的精确因子，增加了可审计的可追溯性，并通过 SRJANA 合成了基准数据基础。

Result: 在受控误设定下，鲁棒折中方案相比朴素点计划将均值和尾部遗憾降低 90% 以上；在受监管的商业决策中，在法律允许的行动空间内优化并定价下行风险；在 41,188 个决策的真实公共数据集上，样本外回测比记录的状态提升 34%，比朴素点规则提升 4%，同时减少优化者诅咒。LLM 在给定正确数字和单目标优化的情况下，产生的保留遗憾约为 YUKTI 的 47 倍。

Conclusion: LLM 是公式化工具而非求解器；YUKTI 的鲁棒公式化方法显著优于单目标点估计方法；在长程因果耦合下，前向传递变得不可靠，需要转为反向归纳因果策略。

Abstract: Language models turn a worded situation into a numeric plan, and the dominant pipelines (NL4Opt, OptiMUS, ORLM, OR-LLM-Agent) commit to a single objective and point-valued coefficients, then solve once. For decisions that allocate real budget, effort, or clinical attention, that confidence is the failure mode: every objectified number is an assumption, and a plan optimal only if the guesses are exactly right is fragile -- mimicry of computation. YUKTI changes the target of autoformulation. Its representation is a typed-proposition graph whose relationships carry shape priors, coefficient uncertainty, and provenance. YUKTI routes each stage to an exact, nonlinear, or evolutionary solver; couples stages by a distributional Pareto hand-off; and introduces Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers (ARPF), resampling assumptions (including structural epsilon-contamination) to score how often each action survives (rho). We prove a bound making rho an exact factor of decision regret, add auditable traceability, and synthesize a benchmark-faithful data foundation when none exists (SRJANA). We validate three ways: under controlled misspecification the robust compromise cuts mean and tail regret by over 90% versus a naive point plan; on a regulated commercial decision we optimize inside a lawful action space and price the downside in euros; and on a real public dataset of 41,188 decisions an out-of-sample backtest beats the logged status quo by 34% and a naive point rule by 4% while reducing the optimizer's curse. The solvers are standard; we claim no benchmark-SOTA win. A head-to-head shows an LLM given the correct numbers, and single-objective optimization, both incur about 47x the held-out regret of YUKTI -- an LLM is a formulator, not a solver. Under long-range causal coupling, the forward hand-off becomes unsound, locating where it must become a backward-induction causal policy.

</details>


### [195] [GES-TSP: Graph Edge Sparsification for TSP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09708)
*Tianfeng Chen,Xianyue Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于学习的图边稀疏化方法（GES），用于欧几里得TSP，通过结合几何结构信息和组合优化技术自适应生成稀疏化图，在MATILDA数据集上可剪枝高达95%的边且解差距保持在1%以内，在TSPLIB上展现出强泛化能力，大规模实例剪枝率超99%且最优性差距低于1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 精确求解大规模TSP实例计算成本高昂，传统图稀疏化方法依赖固定启发式，未能充分利用实例特定的结构信息。

Method: 提出学习驱动的图边稀疏化方法（GES），融合几何结构信息与组合优化技术，为不同实例自适应生成稀疏化图。

Result: 在MATILDA数据集上可剪枝高达95%的边，解差距在1%以内；在TSPLIB基准上展现强泛化能力，大规模实例剪枝率超过99%，最优性差距仍低于1%。

Conclusion: 所提方法能显著减小图规模并加速求解过程，同时保持接近最优的解质量，具有良好的泛化性能。

Abstract: Solving large-scale instances of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) exactly is computationally expensive. Researchers often employ graph sparsification methods to improve computational efficiency. Traditional sparsification methods typically rely on fixed heuristics and fail to fully exploit instance-specific structural information. In this paper, we propose Graph Edge Sparsification (GES), a learning-based sparsification approach for Euclidean TSP. By incorporating geometric structural information and combinatorial optimization technology, our proposed method adaptively generates a sparsification graph for different instances, significantly reducing the graph size and accelerating the solving process. Experimental results demonstrate that our sparsification method can prune up to 95% of edges on the MATILDA dataset, while keeping the solution gap within 1% of the optimal value. Moreover, our approach exhibits strong generalization capability on the TSPLIB benchmark.In some large-scale instances, the pruning rate exceeds 99%, while the optimality gap remains below 1%.

</details>


### [196] [The Verifier is the Curriculum: Execution-Gated Self-Distillation for Cross-Family Game Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09709)
*Chenyu Zhou,Qiliang Jiang,Shuning Wu,Xu Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究代码生成后的确定性无欺骗过滤器（严格启动检查），通过拒绝采样自蒸馏方法，在游戏生成任务中将14B模型的干净生成率从8.8%提升至42.2%，并达到25/25的黄金上限。验证器精度而非优化器本身是提升关键，且增益具有功能性而非表面性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法使用学习型评判器进行后训练会导致模型优化代理特征而非真正改进生成质量。作者希望研究一种确定性、无评判器、不可欺骗的过滤器，以真正提升代码生成的质量和泛化能力。

Method: 采用严格启动检查（strict-launch）作为确定性过滤器，在无头引擎下验证生成项目能否干净启动。基于此门控进行拒绝采样自蒸馏（rejection-sampling self-distillation），在多个轮次中迭代提升模型性能。通过对比实验（黄金重复控制、分解分析、过滤器替换）验证方法有效性。

Result: 在GameCraft-Bench基准上，14B模型经三轮蒸馏后，干净生成率从8.8%提升至42.2%，最佳K覆盖率从18/25提升至25/25（黄金上限）。所有增益均具有统计显著性（p<0.01）。黄金重复控制导致性能退化（5.6%），过滤器替换实验消除全部增益，分解分析显示质量和数量通道贡献相当。

Conclusion: 游戏生成可作为可验证的测试平台，核心教训是：验证器即课程——验证器认证的内容即是模型学习的内容。确定性、不可欺骗的过滤器能够有效引导模型学习真正功能性的生成能力。

Abstract: Post-training a code generator against a learned judge can optimize proxy features that raise the score without improving the artifact. We study the opposite signal: a deterministic, judge-free, ungameable filter -- whether a generated project launches cleanly under a headless engine (strict-launch). Under this gate, rejection-sampling self-distillation compounds out-of-family generalization. On GameCraft-Bench (mapping a natural-language brief to a complete Godot project), a 14B model (Qwen3-14B+LoRA) distilled under strict-launch raises clean generation on four unseen game families from 8.8% to 42.2% per-candidate and best-of-K coverage from 18/25 to 25/25 (the gold ceiling) over three rounds, each a significant gain (p=0.0019, p<1e-4, p<1e-4). The gain is not from merely adding data: an exactly-matched gold-duplication control regresses below the base model (5.6% vs. 8.8%, p=0.019), while a count-matched decomposition splits the round-1-to-2 jump into comparable quality (+8.8pp) and quantity (+8.5pp) channels. Most directly, rerunning the loop with only the filter swapped -- the lenient BUILD check, which passes 99.9% of generations, in place of the launch gate -- erases the gain entirely (back to base, p=1e-3 vs. the launch-gated round), isolating verifier precision rather than the optimizer. A second ungameable signal, headless execution grounding, rises monotonically across rounds and yields far more grounded candidates than gold-duplication at a matched budget (16 vs. 5), confirming the gains are functional, not launch-but-empty. Game generation is a verifiable testbed for one lesson: the verifier is the curriculum -- what it certifies is what the model learns.

</details>


### [197] [Closed-Loop Control with Rule-Aligned Small Language Models and Multi-Agent Self-Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09713)
*Yuchen Wang,Javal Vyas,Tong Liu,Mehmet Mercangoz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究将小型语言模型（SLM）嵌入验证器引导的校正循环中，用于工业自主控制策略生成。使用Qwen2.5-1.5B模型结合GRPO对齐、动作智能体、符号/数字孪生验证层和重新提示智能体，在热控制仿真中达到91.5%的动作对齐准确率和3.84秒平均推理延迟，验证了SLM+验证器架构在边缘端可重构自主控制中的实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现自主工业操作的关键步骤是能够从自然语言需求规范中创建和重新配置控制策略，同时减少或避免手动重新设计。然而，实际部署受限于推理延迟和计算占用：大型云模型对于边缘闭环使用往往过慢、不透明或数据敏感。因此需要探索更紧凑高效的替代方案。

Method: 使用Qwen2.5-1.5B紧凑型小语言模型，通过Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)进行对齐训练。框架包含三个核心组件：(i) 动作智能体，(ii) 符号/数字孪生风格的验证层，(iii) 重新提示智能体，通过迭代方式将输出引导至有效动作。

Result: 在随机热控制仿真中（30个实验，每实验500步），框架达到91.5%平均动作对齐准确率（范围86.3%-100%），平均推理延迟3.84秒。在符号重映射下，保持95%的在范围内比率，表明尽管词元级一致性降低，物理调节依然稳健。

Conclusion: SLM+验证器架构是迈向边缘端可重构自主控制的一条实用路径，在保证控制性能的同时有效控制了推理延迟和计算开销。

Abstract: A key step toward autonomous industrial operation is the ability to create and reconfigure control policies from natural-language requirement specifications, with minimal or no manual redesign. In this setting, policy generation by AI agents can be a credible path when paired with a plant-aware validator (e.g., a digital twin) that can check generated candidate actions before execution. However, practical deployment is constrained by inference latency and compute footprint: large cloud-based models are often too slow, opaque, or data-sensitive for edge closed-loop use. This work investigates whether a compact Small Language Model (SLM) can be retrained for control reasoning and embedded in a validator-guided correction loop. We use a Qwen2.5-1.5B model aligned via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), combined with (i) an action agent, (ii) a symbolic/digital-twin-style validation layer, and (iii) a reprompting agent that iteratively steers outputs toward valid actions. In randomized thermal-control simulations (30 experiments with 500 steps each), the framework achieves 91.5% average action-alignment accuracy (86.3%--100% across cases) at 3.84\,s mean inference latency. Under symbolic re-mapping, it maintains a 95% in-range rate, indicating robust physical regulation despite reduced token-level agreement. These results support SLM+validator architectures as a practical path toward reconfigurable autonomous control at the edge.

</details>


### [198] [Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems in Continuous Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09714)
*Stefano Grassi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了反馈耦合记忆系统（FCMS）架构的连续时间实例化，通过基于机制智能（MBI）定义代理更新算子 $f_i$ 和耦合记忆图过程（CMGP）定义环境更新算子 $\Psi$，建立了全局李雅普诺夫耗散性条件 $4\beta^2 < 2\eta\mu\gamma^2$，证实了记忆耗散必须超过反馈增益作为通用组织原则，并通过 $N=2$ 和 $N=10^6$ 的数值模拟验证了稳定性阈值及违反时的自强化协调级联现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始FCMS框架中两个关键算子（代理更新算子 $f_i$ 和环境更新算子 $\Psi$）未被公理化定义，限制了框架的可计算性和物理可实现性。

Method: 采用MBI通过去中心化价格机制和经济原理定义 $f_i$，采用CMGP将环境视为记录并相干响应轨迹历史的物理基底来定义 $\Psi$，构建连续时间FCMS，并导出全局李雅普诺夫耗散性条件。

Result: 导出了全局耗散性阈值 $4\beta^2 < 2\eta\mu\gamma^2$，统一了离散FCMS稳定性条件 $4\eta\beta^2 < \gamma$ 和CMGP物理分岔阈值 $\alpha_c = 1/K$；数值模拟验证了稳定性边界及阈值违反时的协调级联现象。

Conclusion: 记忆耗散必须超过反馈增益是普适的组织原则，FCMS的连续时间实例化在理论上统一了离散系统和物理系统的稳定性条件。

Abstract: The Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems (FCMS) architecture formalizes closed-loop coordination through four abstract operators, two of which - the agent update operator $f_i$ and the environmental update operator $Ψ$ - are left axiomatically undefined in the original framework. To address this, $f_i$ is defined by Mechanism-Based Intelligence (MBI), where agents update locally through a decentralized price mechanism and economic principles, and $Ψ$ is defined by the Coupled Memory Graph Process (CMGP), a non-Markovian framework where the environment is treated as a physical substrate that records and responds to trajectory history coherently without external forcing. The resulting continuous-time FCMS instantiation achieves Lyapunov global dissipativity governed by the computable threshold $4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$. This generalizes both the discrete FCMS stability condition $4ηβ^2 < γ$ and CMGP's physical bifurcation threshold $α_c = 1/K$, confirming that memory dissipation must outpace feedback gain as a universal organizing principle. Numerical simulation with $N=2$ agents and mean-field validation at $N=10^6$ confirm the stability threshold and the self-reinforcing coordination cascade that emerges when it is violated.

</details>


### [199] [AGM-like Paraconsistent Partial Meet Abductive Expansion Operation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09729)
*Ulisses Franceschi Eliano*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文基于Pagnucco的溯因扩张操作和Aliseda的溯因分类法，提出了首个非经典（次协调）AGM式溯因扩张操作AGMpabd，利用次协调逻辑RCbr（一种LFI）避免矛盾假设导致的认知状态平凡化，并给出了其公设和传递关系偏交构造。这是系列论文的第一篇，第二篇将增强非经典否定和一致性算子的认知作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AGM溯因扩张操作无法处理矛盾性解释性假设，会导致认知状态平凡化（trivialization）。作者希望填补这一空白，构建一个能在矛盾存在下依然保持理性信念修正能力的非经典溯因扩张框架。

Method: 以Pagnucco的溯因扩张操作为基础，结合Aliseda的溯因分类法，采用次协调逻辑RCbr（一种自外延的LFI）作为底层逻辑，定义新的溯因扩张操作AGMpabd，并为其建立对应的公设集以及传递关系偏交构造（transitively relational partial meet construction）。

Result: 成功构造了首个AGM意义上的次协调溯因扩张操作AGMpabd，该操作能在接受矛盾解释性假设时不导致认知状态平凡化，并满足相应的理论公设和构造刻画。

Conclusion: 本文提出的AGMpabd是AGM文献中首个次协调溯因扩张操作，但尚未赋予非经典否定和一致性算子以实质的认知角色，这一局限将在后续论文（AGMcircabd）中解决。

Abstract: In his 1996 doctoral thesis, Maurice Pagnucco created the first AGM-like abductive expansion operation. Taking his operation as a basis, as well as a taxonomy -- inspired by Atocha Aliseda -- responsible for highlighting and formalizing the main components of abductive reasoning, the main aim of this paper is to present a new paraconsistent AGM-like abductive expansion operation -- capable of assimilating contradictory explanatory hypotheses without trivialization and the consequent absurd epistemic state -- with its postulates and its transitively relational partial meet construction. To a large extent, the formal development presented in this paper was only made possible by the recent creation of the paraconsistent logic RCbr, an LFI (Logics of Formal Inconsistencies) that establishes properties especially relevant to belief revision contexts, in particular, the ability to be self-extensional -- i.e., to satisfy the replacement property. This is the first of two papers: the paraconsistent abductive expansion operation announced here -- which is part of a new system called AGMpabd -- despite bringing many interesting features, does not assign any relevant epistemic role to the paraconsistent operators of negation and consistency. Only in a second paper will an analogous paraconsistent abductive expansion operation -- which is part of another new system, AGMcircabd -- be enhanced in this direction. Nevertheless, to the best of my knowledge, the operation developed in this paper is the first of its kind in the AGM literature.

</details>


### [200] [Coresets Before Score Sets: Evaluation-Unsupervised Prompt Subset Selection for LLM Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09739)
*Jihan Yao,Gantavya Bhatt,Arnav Das,Peter Jin,Ke Bao,Qiaolin Yu,Khushi Bhardwaj,Chang Su,Jialei Wang,Yikai Zhu,Sugam Devare,Damon Mosk-Aoyama,Zhen Dong,Venkat Krishna Srinivasan,Yineng Zhang,Oleksii Kuchaiev,Jiantao Jiao,Banghua Zhu,Jeff Bilmes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于子模函数（特别是设施选址函数）的无监督基准测试核心集选择方法，仅利用语义嵌入即可高效压缩包含35个异构基准、18个前沿LLM和超过6.1万条提示的大规模测试套件，在保留模型分数和排名的同时显著降低计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模LLM基准测试套件评估成本高昂，现有方法要么依赖模型评估结果（有监督），要么以粗粒度方式选择整个基准子集。本文旨在探索一种无需模型评估结果、细粒度的无监督核心集选择方法，在保证模型分数和排名近似精度的前提下大幅降低评估成本。

Method: 采用子模子集选择框架，评估了多种子模函数，包括行列式点过程（DPP）、子模互信息函数和设施选址（FL）函数。核心创新在于FL函数仅使用廉价的语义提示嵌入（而非模型评估分数）即可运行，实现了完全无监督的评估场景。

Result: 在包含35个异构基准、18个前沿LLM和6.1万条提示的大规模套件上，基于语义嵌入的FL函数在多个核心集预算下，在保留模型分数方面优于12种基于分数和多样性的基线方法。在仅有少量完整基准需选择且有大量模型分数的场景下，FL函数在MMLU和MTEB排行榜上匹配或超越现有最优方法，且计算成本更低。

Conclusion: 子模性（特别是设施选址函数）是基准压缩的强有力且可靠的通用工具，能够在不同监督程度和粒度设置下有效工作。

Abstract: We study LLM benchmark coreset selection: selecting a small subset of prompts over multiple benchmarks whose induced model scores and rankings approximate those obtained from the full benchmark suite. In evaluation-unsupervised benchmark coreset selection (our approach), the selection algorithm uses no model evaluation outcomes, and operates on a fine granularity by producing subsets of prompts over multiple benchmarks rather than producing a sub-collection of entire benchmarks. We use submodular subset selection, and we develop and evaluate many different submodular functions for this purpose, including determinantal point process (DPP) based approaches, submodular mutual information functions, and facility location-based functions. On a new large-scale suite of 35 heterogeneous benchmarks spanning five different capability categories, 18 frontier LLMs, and over 61K prompts, we find that the facility location (FL) function operating exclusively on inexpensive semantic prompt embeddings preserves LLM scores better than twelve separate score-based and diversity-based baselines, across a range of coreset budgets. Moreover, we show our proposed objective is not limited to the evaluation-unsupervised regime: in the setting where only a handful of whole benchmarks must be selected and a large amount of model scores are available, the same objective matches or outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on the MMLU and MTEB leaderboards, while being substantially cheaper to compute. Together, our results suggest that submodularity, in general, is a strong and reliable tool for benchmark compression.

</details>


### [201] [A Dynamic Scene Interaction Reasoning Framework for Scene-level Lane-Change Intention and Trajectory Prediction of Multiple Interacting Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09740)
*Joshua Kofi Asamoah,Blessing Agyei Kyem,Eugene Denteh,Armstrong Aboah*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出动态场景图注意力框架（DSiGAT），通过图注意力消息传递和意图引导解码器，同时预测交通场景中所有相关车辆的换道意图和未来轨迹，在NGSIM和highD数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有换道预测方法多聚焦于单一目标车辆，而多智能体预测方法仅输出未来位置，缺乏对每辆车具体机动意图的显式预测，难以实现对交通场景演变的全面理解。

Method: 将交通场景建模为时变交互图（车辆为节点，空间/运动学关系为边），通过时序图注意力消息传递捕捉车辆间依赖关系和机动前线索，利用意图引导解码器将预测的机动与未来轨迹关联，并引入场景级一致性目标优化多车联合预测。

Result: 在NGSIM I-80和US-101上意图预测准确率分别达90.12%和90.97%，轨迹RMSE相比最强基线降低高达52.94%，同时碰撞率和联合位移误差更低。

Conclusion: DSiGAT通过场景级图结构建模和意图-轨迹联合预测，有效提升了多车机动识别与未来轨迹预测的一致性和准确性。

Abstract: Safe motion planning in advanced driver-assistance systems and autonomous vehicles requires an accurate understanding of how the surrounding traffic scene is likely to evolve. However, many existing lane-change prediction methods remain centered on a single target vehicle, while multi-agent forecasting approaches often describe scene evolution only through future positions and provide limited explicit information about the maneuver associated with each vehicle. This study proposes a dynamic scene graph attention framework that predicts the lane-change intention and future trajectory of every relevant vehicle within a local traffic scene. The scene is represented as a time-varying interaction graph in which vehicles are modeled as nodes and their spatial and kinematic relationships are encoded through explicit edge features. Temporal graph-attention message passing captures evolving inter-vehicle dependencies and pre-maneuver cues, while an intention-guided decoder links each predicted maneuver to its corresponding future motion. A scene-level consistency objective further encourages compatible multi-vehicle futures. Experiments on the NGSIM I-80, NGSIM US-101, and highD datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over competing baselines. DSiGAT achieves intention prediction accuracies of 90.12% and 90.97% on NGSIM I-80 and US-101, respectively, and reduces trajectory RMSE by up to 52.94% relative to the strongest baseline. It also produces lower inter-agent collision rates and joint displacement errors, indicating more coherent scene-level predictions. Ablation, sensitivity, robustness, and qualitative analyses further validate the contribution of the proposed components and the effectiveness of the scene-focused formulation.

</details>


### [202] [Scaffolding the Strategist: Architecture-Dependent Reasoning Interventions in Hotelling Spatial Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09743)
*Pratyush Singh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究通过Hotelling线性城市模型，系统评估了结构化推理干预对GPT-4.1-mini（标准指令跟随模型）和GPT-5-mini（推理优化模型）战略经济推理的影响。发现在承诺支架和原则分离两种干预下，两种模型存在显著的交叉交互作用：承诺支架提升标准模型但降低推理模型，原则分离则呈现相反模式。对抗性压力测试对两种模型均有损害，且对推理模型的损害更大。同时存在陈述-程序性差距，即模型识别正确策略的能力远高于执行能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究结构化推理干预是否能提升大语言模型的战略经济推理能力，以及这种效果是否依赖于模型架构。当前LLM在经济推理任务中表现参差不齐，亟需系统性的干预方法来诊断和改进其推理机制。

Method: 以Hotelling线性城市模型为诊断工具，评估GPT-4.1-mini（标准指令跟随模型）和GPT-5-mini（推理优化模型）在五种条件（一个无支架基线 + 四种推理干预）下的表现。实验涵盖8个问题（涵盖演绎和溯因推理）、3种提示框架、每种条件重复3次，共产生720个独立评判的响应。采用统计显著性检验分析交互效应。

Result: 发现支架类型与模型架构之间存在统计显著的交叉交互作用（t(7)=4.79, p=0.002, d=1.69）：承诺支架提升标准模型（+0.21）但降低推理模型（-0.63），原则分离则相反（-0.40 vs +0.31）。对抗性压力测试对两种模型均有损害，推理模型退化程度是标准模型的2.6倍（-1.47 vs -0.57）。存在陈述-程序性差距，原则分离可完全弥合推理模型的该差距，但没有干预能帮助标准模型。

Conclusion: 结构化推理干预的效果高度依赖于模型架构，不存在一刀切的干预策略。未来的LLM经济推理能力评估应区分陈述性知识（识别正确策略）和程序性知识（执行策略），并针对不同架构设计差异化的推理支架。

Abstract: We investigate whether structured reasoning interventions improve the strategic economic reasoning of large language models, and whether their effects depend on model architecture. Using Hotelling's linear city model as a diagnostic vehicle, we evaluate GPT-4.1-mini (a standard instruction-following model) and GPT-5-mini (a reasoning-optimized model) under five conditions - an unscaffolded baseline and four reasoning interventions - across eight questions spanning deductive and abductive reasoning, three prompt framings, and three repetitions per condition, yielding 720 individually judged responses. We find a statistically significant crossover interaction between scaffolding type and model architecture ($t(7) = 4.79$, $p = 0.002$, $d = 1.69$): commitment scaffolding improves the standard model ($+0.21$) while degrading the reasoning model ($-0.63$), and principled separation shows the opposite pattern ($-0.40$ vs. $+0.31$). Both crossovers are individually significant (commitment: $p = 0.040$; separation: $p = 0.002$) and hold across all eight questions with 7/8 directional consistency. Adversarial stress-testing harms both models, with $2.6\times$ greater degradation for the reasoning model ($-1.47$ vs. $-0.57$; $p = 0.038$), and the damage correlates negatively with baseline difficulty ($R^2 = 0.36$, $p = 0.014$). We further document a persistent declarative-procedural gap in which both models identify correct strategies at rates far exceeding their ability to execute them; separation fully closes this gap for the reasoning model while no intervention helps the standard model.

</details>


### [203] [A Theory of Least Autonomy in AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09744)
*Christophe Parisel*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"最小自治"原则作为对AI智能体系统的最小权限原则的泛化，并建立了形式化理论，包括组合爆炸半径、有向智能体影响图和合谋谓词三个核心组件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统最小权限原则无法适用于智能体AI系统，因为这类系统中的身份不仅能持有权限，还能跨工作流和系统边界组合、审批和放大权限。

Method: 1) 定义组合爆炸半径d(a,b)，结合超度量树和格值保密性、完整性及控制上下文标签来度量企业层级中动作间的结构分离程度；2) 定义有向智能体影响图G(θ)，基于共享资源写-读通信或保守的无向A2A通信构建弧，并用策略阈值θ筛选影响潜力；3) 定义基于图可达性的合谋谓词，检测授权组合、决策操纵和跨域能力组合。

Result: 提出了目录-半径剖面用于校准和审计策略阈值θ，以及合谋检测机制。

Conclusion: 最小自治原则是最小权限在智能体AI时代的适当泛化，为这类系统的访问控制提供了形式化理论基础。

Abstract: Least privilege, the principle that an identity should hold only the permissions strictly required for its task, has been a foundational primitive of access control for decades. We argue that this principle is insufficient for agentic AI systems, which do not merely hold permissions but can combine, approve, and amplify them across workflows and system boundaries.
  We propose least autonomy as an appropriate generalization and develop a formal theory. First, we define a compositional blast radius d(a,b) that measures structural separation between actions in an enterprise hierarchy, combining an ultrametric tree with lattice-valued confidentiality, integrity, and control-context labels. Second, we define a directed agent influence graph G(theta). An arc from U to V requires a directed shared-resource write-to-read meeting or a conservative undirected agent-to-agent (A2A) communication meeting, and a meeting-conditioned influence potential at or above an externally selected policy threshold theta. A catalogue-radius profile supports calibration and audit of theta. Finally, we define a collusion predicate over graph reachability that detects authorization composition, decision manipulation, and cross-domain capability composition.

</details>


### [204] [SupplyNetPy: An Open-Source Python Library for High-Fidelity Modeling and Simulation of Arbitrary Supply Chain and Inventory Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09745)
*Tushar Lone,Neha Karanjkar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SupplyNetPy是一个开源的Python库，用于对具有任意多级结构的供应链网络进行建模和离散事件仿真，支持多种补货策略、易腐库存、节点中断以及随机需求和提前期，并通过继承实现组件扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 支持复杂供应链模型的程序化生成与仿真，实现设计空间探索、假设分析、训练数据生成以及供应链数字孪生。

Method: 将供应链描述为带有节点和边属性的图结构，采用离散事件仿真引擎，所有组件通过继承机制实现可扩展性，提供日志记录和全面的节点及网络级性能报告。

Result: 通过解析基准、商业工具和已发表案例研究三方面进行了详细验证。

Conclusion: SupplyNetPy作为一个开放源码、文档完善的工具，为复杂供应链网络建模与仿真提供了灵活、可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: This paper introduces SupplyNetPy, an open-source, well-documented Python library for modeling and discrete-event simulation of supply chain networks with arbitrary multi-echelon structures. It supports multiple replenishment policies, perishable inventory, node disruptions, and stochastic demand and lead times. All components are extensible via inheritance. Users describe a supply chain as a graph with node and link attributes, while the library handles simulation, providing logs and extensive node and network level performance reports. This paper presents the motivation, design, key features, and architecture of SupplyNetPy, along with detailed validation results (against analytical benchmarks, a commercial tool, and a published case study). A key motivation behind SupplyNetPy's development is programmatic generation and simulation of complex models, enabling design-space exploration, what-if analysis, training data generation, and supply chain digital twins.

</details>


### [205] [Replicating Belief, Not Bits: Epistemic State Replication for Agentic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09748)
*Jun He,Deying Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Epistemic State Replication (ESR)，一种面向智能体分布式系统的信念复制层，将复制边界从数据可见性扩展至知识可见性，使随机性副本在语义上而非比特位上达成一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统状态机复制（SMR）要求副本执行确定性转换以获得完全相同的比特级状态，但在智能体分布式系统中，使用生成式模型的自治随机副本可能产生不同的推理路径和摘要，却能达成语义等价的正确决策。强制比特级一致会降低执行灵活性、导致上下文遗忘并限制性能。

Method: 定义节点认知状态为对(L, B)，其中L是确定性不可变证据日志，B是随机演化的信念谱系；提出语义线性化（Semantic Linearizability）和有界最终一致性（Bounded Eventual Coherence）；设计结构化认知delta传播协议和可验证的语义回滚（Verifiable Semantic Rollbacks）机制。

Result: 初步仿真结果表明在给定假设下ESR是可行的，并展示了次级认知错误的减少。

Conclusion: 面向智能体分布式系统，副本应在信念层面上达成一致而非比特位一致，ESR通过将复制边界从数据可见性提升至知识可见性来实现这一目标。

Abstract: In distributed systems, the classical State Machine Replication (SMR) model assumes that correct replicas execute deterministic transitions to yield identical bitwise states. However, the rise of agentic distributed systems -- where autonomous, stochastic, and model-driven agents orchestrate infrastructure -- presents scenarios where deterministic, bitwise replication is insufficient. Replicas operating with generative models may exhibit divergent reasoning paths, summaries, and token boundaries, yet reach semantically equivalent and correct operational decisions. Forcing bitwise agreement across these stochastic participants degrades execution flexibility, induces context amnesia, and limits performance.
  We argue that in such settings replicas should agree on belief, not bits. We propose Epistemic State Replication (ESR), a belief-replication layer for agentic distributed systems that shifts the replication boundary from data visibility to knowledge visibility. We formalize the epistemic node state as a pair K = (L, B) separating the deterministic, immutable evidence log (L) from the stochastic, evolving belief lineage (B). To govern execution safety, we define Semantic Linearizability, which requires operations to reflect the latest committed operational meaning within a verifier-bounded semantic compatibility metric, and Bounded Eventual Coherence, which bounds expected semantic divergence under fair delivery, monotonic evidence, bounded verifier disturbance, and a contractive graft operator. We outline protocols for propagating derived insights using structured epistemic deltas, and formalize Verifiable Semantic Rollbacks to prune faulty premises from belief lineages without inducing context amnesia. We prototype ESR and report preliminary simulation results that show feasibility under the stated assumptions and illustrate reductions in secondary cognitive faults.

</details>


### [206] [Task-Conditioned Synthetic Data Generation for Improving Machine Learning Performance in Agricultural Prediction Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09751)
*Hamid Ebrahimy,Moritz Lucas,Martin Atzmueller*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出任务条件合成数据生成（TCSDG）算法，结合贝叶斯网络生成器与基于Transformer的表格基础模型（TabICL），用于农业预测任务。在作物产量预测和作物类型分类两项任务、12个研究站点、多种训练数据比例和倍增比下，TCSDG在89%的分类实验和74%的回归实验中提升了ML性能，且是唯一在聚合层面持续提升两项任务性能的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ML算法在农业变量估计中广泛使用，但训练数据的数量和质量严重制约其性能，有限的或不完整的参考数据成为瓶颈。合成数据生成提供了一种实用途径，通过产生保留原始数据关键特征的人工样本解决数据不足问题。

Method: 提出TCSDG算法，采用教师-学生知识迁移和上下文学习策略，将贝叶斯网络生成器与基于Transformer的表格基础模型TabICL配对，实现任务条件化的合成数据生成。

Result: 在12个研究站点、2种训练数据比例、4种倍增比和3种预测ML算法下，TCSDG在89%的作物类型分类实验和74%的作物产量预测实验中提升了ML性能，显著优于六种基准SDG算法。

Conclusion: 精心设计和处理的合成数据能够提升精准农业中ML应用的性能。TCSDG提供了一个实用且可扩展的合成数据生成框架，支持下游ML农业预测任务，且已作为开源代码公开发布。

Abstract: Machine Learning (ML) algorithms have been widely used to estimate agricultural variables across diverse contexts. However, because the quantity and quality of training data strongly influence performance of ML algorithms, their use can be constrained by limited or incomplete reference data. Synthetic Data Generation (SDG) offers a practical approach to address this issue by producing artificial but realistic samples that preserve key characteristics of the original data. Building on teacher-student knowledge transfer and in-context learning for tabular data, this study proposes a Task-Conditioned SDG (TCSDG) algorithm that pairs a Bayesian Network generator with a transformer-based tabular foundation model (TabICL). The proposed algorithm was evaluated on two agricultural prediction tasks: crop yield prediction and crop type classification. Six benchmark SDG algorithms were also utilized to compare their performance with that of TCSDG. Across twelve study sites, two training-data fractions, four multiplication ratios, and three predictive ML algorithms, augmenting the original data with TCSDG-generated synthetic data improved ML performance in 89% of the crop type classification experiments and 74% of the crop yield prediction experiments. TCSDG also substantially outperformed benchmark SDG algorithms and was the only method to consistently improve ML performance across both tasks at the aggregate level. The study demonstrates that carefully designed and processed synthetic data can improve ML performance in precision-agriculture applications. TCSDG offers a practical and extensible framework for generating synthetic data that supports downstream ML agricultural prediction. The full implementation of TCSDG is publicly available as open source at https://github.com/HamidEbrahimy/TCSDG.

</details>


### [207] [LegalFarePlan: A Label-Setting Framework for Fare-Transparent Urban Rail Route Planning under Non-Additive Fare Rules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09755)
*Tanghui Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出LegalFarePlan框架，通过建模合法的出站再入站操作，在非加性城市轨道交通票价系统中计算可解释的票价优化路线方案，在合成数据上验证了该方法能有效识别票价降低机会。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市轨道交通票价系统可能具有非加性特征（单程票价不等于分段票价之和），现有路线规划方法未考虑合法的出站再入站操作对票价的影响，缺乏票价透明的路线规划框架。

Method: 提出LegalFarePlan框架，将合法的出站再入站操作建模为显式且可审计的约束；实现了Dijkstra最短时间路线规划基线、贪心分割启发式、有界精确标签设置和帕累托前沿搜索等多种算法。

Result: 在57站半合成基准测试中，有界精确搜索在71.11%的OD对上识别到正向票价降低，平均降低3.78单位，最大降低9.0单位（在45分钟额外时间预算下）。

Conclusion: 该方法展示了良好的可重复性，但结果属于方法行为验证，并非对任何实际运营商的实证结论。

Abstract: Urban rail fare systems may be non-additive: the fare of a single paid journey from an origin to a destination can differ from the sum of fares over multiple legally separated journey legs. This paper presents LegalFarePlan, a fare-transparent route-planning framework that models legal exit-and-reentry operations as explicit, auditable constraints. Given a transit network, fare function, transfer rules, station-level exit/re-entry costs, an extra-time budget, and a split limit, the planner computes explainable route plans over paid journey segments. The artifact implements Dijkstra shortest-time and direct route-planner baselines, a greedy split heuristic, bounded exact label-setting, and Pareto-frontier search. Evaluation uses controlled synthetic data and a 57-station semi-synthetic benchmark with 360 OD pairs. On the semi-synthetic benchmark, bounded exact search identifies positive modeled fare reductions for 71.11% of OD pairs, with mean reduction 3.78 and maximum reduction 9.0 synthetic fare units under a 45-minute extra-time budget. These results demonstrate method behavior and reproducibility; they are not empirical conclusions about MTR or any transit operator.

</details>


### [208] [BatteryLake: Agentic, Physics-Grounded Curation of Heterogeneous Battery Aging Data and Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09762)
*Tianwen Zhu,Hao Wang,Yonggang Wen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: BatteryLake是一个基于LLM智能体与物理约束的数据湖仓，可将原始电池老化数据自动转化为标准化基准数据集，包含41个标准化数据集、三种划分协议和八类基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前公共电池老化数据集存在格式不一致、模式不清晰、元数据分散等问题，人工整理难以复现，通用数据集成工具缺乏电化学时序数据的领域语义。

Method: 1) LLM智能体提取元数据并合成数据集专用转换器，基于逐字证据推理并在无证据时弃权；2) 人在回路机制将验证建模为选择性预测，通过26条模式、统计和物理合理性规则筛选数据；3) 发布包含41个数据集、标准化SOH/RUL任务、三种划分协议和八类基线模型的开放基准。

Result: 构建了来自25+机构的41个标准化数据集，提供标准化SOH和RUL评估任务，三种数据划分协议，以及八类基线模型家族。

Conclusion: BatteryLake通过智能体驱动的物理约束数据湖仓，有效解决了电池数据标准化和可复现性问题，并已开源平台、基准和整理协议。

Abstract: Public battery aging datasets are a critical asset for advanced health management, but their practical use is often limited by inconsistent formats, unclear schemas, and metadata scattered across repositories and publications. Current curation remains largely manual and hard to reproduce, while general-purpose data integration tools miss the domain-specific semantics of electrochemical time-series data. We present BatteryLake, a governed data lakehouse that turns raw public battery data into benchmark-ready assets through an agentic, physics-grounded curation framework, with three contributions. First, LLM agents extract metadata and synthesize dataset-specific converters, grounding every output in verbatim evidence and abstaining when none supports a value. Second, a human-in-the-loop mechanism frames verification as selective prediction and gates admitted data through 26 schema, statistical, and physical-plausibility rules. Third, we release an open benchmark of 41 datasets from over 25 institutions, with standardized SOH and RUL tasks, three split protocols, and eight baseline model families. The platform, benchmark, and curation protocol are publicly available at https://tianwen1209.github.io/batterylake/.

</details>


### [209] [How Much Does Correctness Cost? Budgeted Placement of Strong Correctors in a Weak Multi-Agent Swarm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09765)
*Igor Itkin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究了在图中放置少量强大"预言机"节点来引导廉价不可靠智能体集群达成正确共识的问题，证明了成本耦合凹性下的子模性，给出了预算-正确性边界，并发现成本-质量曲线的凹凸性取决于具体任务（数学验证 vs 代码追踪）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究如何以最小成本通过放置少量强校正者（预言机）来引导大规模不可靠智能体集群达成正确共识，即预算约束下的最优预言机放置问题。

Method: 将问题建模为图上共识过程，每个预言机以成本耦合的凹强度将节点钉向真相，用相干性H(R)=tr M(R)^{-1}度量质量。证明子模性，推导闭式预算-正确性边界，并在Qwen3模型上实证验证成本-质量曲线形状。

Result: 证明了各预言机强度不同时H仍保持子模性，贪心算法达到1-1/e最优性；给出了完全图上的闭式预算-正确性边界B*(eps)和同等成本下的最小预言机数量k*；发现数学验证任务中成本-质量曲线为凹，代码追踪为凸。

Conclusion: 预算约束下最优预言机放置策略依赖于任务特性：收益递减（凹）时倾向于分散放置多个中等强度预言机，收益递增（凸）时则集中资源购买少量强预言机。

Abstract: A cheap swarm of unreliable agents can be steered to a correct consensus by a few strong, expensive "oracle" correctors. We ask how much one must spend, and where to place the oracles. We model the swarm as a consensus on a graph in which each oracle pins one node toward the truth at a cost-coupled, concave strength, and measure quality by the coherence H(R)=tr M(R)^{-1}. Our first result is that H stays submodular (each added oracle helps less than the last) even when the oracles differ in strength, so a cost-benefit greedy comes within 1-1/e of the best placement at any budget. Inverting the budget gives the budget-correctness frontier B*(eps), the least spend that guarantees an eps-correct consensus: closed-form on the complete graph, and a minimal oracle count k* when oracles cost the same. Whether a budget then buys a few strong oracles or many medium onese curvature of the cost-quality law: diminishing returns favour spreadsharply increasion. Measured onthe Qwen3 ladder (0.6-32B), the law is concave for math verificatio convex foremergent code tracing, so the verdict is genuinely task-dependent.https://github.com/YehudaItkin/budgeted-oracle-placemen

</details>


### [210] [Norm Enforcement for AI Agents: Robustly Shaping Behavior in Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09766)
*Yaowen Ye,Jacob Steinhardt*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究语言模型智能体在多智能体竞争环境中的规范执行机制，发现简单机制易被恶意智能体利用，而结合可靠性评估与递增惩罚的鲁棒机制能有效抵抗利用，同时维持可比或更低的惩罚成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体竞争环境中，个体追求自身利益的行为可能损害集体利益（如营销智能体发布误导内容争夺关注），人类社会通过规范及执行机制解决这一问题，受此启发，研究语言模型智能体的规范执行机制。

Method: 设计鲁棒规范执行机制，包含两个关键要素：(1) 随时间估计每个智能体的可靠性；(2) 对重复违规行为实施递增惩罚。在三个模拟环境和多种智能体群体中评估该机制。

Result: 简单规范执行机制易被未经过显式训练或提示的恶意智能体利用以获取竞争优势；而基于可靠性估计和递增惩罚的鲁棒机制能抵抗利用，同时惩罚成本与基线相当或更低。

Conclusion: 规范执行机制可作为塑造智能体行为的可扩展杠杆，但前提是设计时需预见到自身将成为所治理系统的一部分。

Abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed in shared environments where they pursue diverse goals and compete for rewards. This multi-agent competition can lead to behaviors that serve individual gains at collective cost -- for instance, marketing agents may post misleading content as a result of competing for engagement on social media. Human societies address such problems through norms that constrain acceptable behavior, supported by enforcement mechanisms that detect and penalize violations. Motivated by this, we study norm enforcement mechanisms for language model agents. We find that simple enforcement mechanisms are exploited by misaligned agents for competitive advantage, even when they are not explicitly trained or prompted to do so. We thus turn our attention to designing more robust mechanisms, and identify two key ingredients: estimating each agent's reliability over time, and updating this estimate with escalating penalties for repeated misbehavior. Across three simulated environments and a variety of agent populations, mechanisms built on these principles resist exploitation, while still penalizing norm violations at comparable or lower cost than baselines. Our results position norm enforcement mechanisms as scalable levers for shaping agents' behavior, but only when designed to anticipate becoming part of the system they govern. Our code and data are available at https://yaowenye.com/norm-enforcement.

</details>


### [211] [Verification of Adaptive Agentic Controllers through Finite Rule Revision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09770)
*Roberto Garrone*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对自适应智能体控制器的有界验证协议，将控制器表示为有限符号规则、显式诊断谓词、解释日志和保留再评估。该协议能够检测、局部修复或拒绝特定类型的控制器故障，而无需依赖不受限制的人类介入。实验表明，资源诱导故障不可单步修复、部分修复因违反阈值被拒绝、以及平滑规则移除可局部修复订单波动故障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业智能体AI系统在原型能力与实际部署之间存在差距，自适应智能体可能生成看似合理但难以验证的输出，面临非确定性、保密性约束、有限上下文和弱可观测性等挑战。

Method: 将控制器视为有限可修正对象，通过有限符号规则、显式诊断谓词、解释日志和保留再评估进行表示。诊断故障映射到预定义的规则级编辑（规则添加、删除、优先级修订），然后在保留仿真种子或克隆初始状态下评估修复后的控制器。

Result: 在受财务约束的库存控制基准测试中，识别出三类结果：资源诱导故障不可通过单规则编辑修复；部分修复因违反阈值或护栏被拒绝；通过移除平滑规则实现订单波动故障的局部单步修复。

Conclusion: 本文贡献是方法论层面的，提供了一种与仿真兼容的规程，用于测试特定控制器级故障是否在可控条件下可观测、可解释、可局部修正并可经验性地重新测试。

Abstract: Industrial agentic AI systems increasingly exhibit a gap between prototype capability and production deployment. In particular, adaptive agents may generate plausible outputs while remaining difficult to verify under non-determinism, confidentiality constraints, limited context, and weak observability. This paper formulates a bounded verification protocol for adaptive agentic controllers represented by finite symbolic rules, explicit diagnostic predicates, explanation logs, and held-out re-evaluation. The central research question is: when an adaptive agentic controller is represented through finite rules, explicit diagnostic predicates, explanation logs, and held-out re-evaluation, which classes of controller failure can be detected, locally repaired, or rejected without relying on unrestricted human-in-the-loop judgment? The proposed framework treats the controller as a finite revisable object. Diagnostic failures are mapped to predefined rule-level edits, including rule addition, rule deletion, and priority revision. Repaired controllers are then evaluated on held-out simulation seeds or cloned initial states. Experiments in a stylized financially constrained inventory-control benchmark show three outcomes: resource-induced failures that remain non-repairable by one rule edit, partial repairs that are rejected because they violate thresholds or guardrails, and a local one-step repair of an order-volatility failure induced by removing a smoothing rule. The contribution is methodological and provides a simulation-compatible procedure for testing whether specific controller-level failures can be made observable, explainable, locally revisable, and empirically re-tested under controlled conditions.

</details>


### [212] [EvoCUA-1.5: Online Reinforcement Learning for Multi-turn Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09773)
*Mianqiu Huang,Taofeng Xue,Chong Peng,Jinrui Ding,Sicheng Fan,Jiale Hong,Yufei Gao,Xiaocheng Zhang,Linsen Guo,Xin Yang,Dengchang Zhao,Yuchen Xie,Peng Pei,Xunliang Xie,Xipeng Qiu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: EvoCUA-1.5 将自我进化计算机使用智能体从离线经验学习扩展到在线强化学习，通过 STEPO 策略优化、DTAC 自适应课程学习和异步 RL 基础设施，解决了多轮交互中的上下文管理、稀疏奖励和变长轨迹等挑战，在 OSWorld-Verified 上达到 63.2% 的成功率，超越同参数量级基线并接近更大模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的计算机使用智能体受限于离线轨迹的静态性质，无法覆盖真实计算机使用中的因果反馈循环（每次动作改变屏幕状态、未来动作空间及恢复选项），亟需将学习范式从离线经验扩展到在线强化学习以利用可验证任务结果进行策略改进。

Method: 提出 EvoCUA-1.5 框架，核心组件包括：(1) Step-Level Policy Optimization (STEPO)，将多轮轨迹分解为步级样本并保持轨迹级优势平衡；(2) 策略感知过滤和通过率标定；(3) Dynamic Tri-Adaptive Curriculum (DTAC)，结合可学习任务、困难正向回放和受控不可行任务暴露；(4) 完全异步的 RL 基础设施，包含陈旧性控制和迷你分组批处理。

Result: 在 OSWorld-Verified 基准上达到 63.2% 的成功率，优于同规模（32B/35B）的开源基线模型，甚至接近参数量显著更大的模型性能。

Conclusion: EvoCUA-1.5 提供了一套实用的在线多轮 RL 扩展框架，验证了在线强化学习在长时间跨度的计算机使用智能体任务中的可行性和有效性。

Abstract: Computer-use agents must solve long-horizon tasks through repeated interaction with partially observable, multimodal desktop environments. Although imitation learning and offline trajectory refinement provide strong priors, static traces cannot cover the causal feedback loop of real computer use: each action changes the screen state, future action space, and recovery options. EvoCUA-1.5 extends self-evolving computer-use agents from offline experience learning to online reinforcement learning, where policies interact with executable sandbox environments and improve from verifiable task outcomes. Online RL in this setting requires more than directly reusing single-turn language-RL recipes. Multi-turn interaction introduces context-managed observations, sparse terminal rewards, variable-length trajectories, and slow environment feedback. EvoCUA-1.5 addresses these challenges with Step-Level Policy Optimization (STEPO), which preserves trajectory-level advantage balance after decomposition into step-level samples; policy-aware filtering and pass-rate calibration over verifiable synthesized tasks; Dynamic Tri-Adaptive Curriculum (DTAC), which combines learnable tasks, difficult positive replay, and controlled infeasible-task exposure; and a fully asynchronous RL infrastructure with staleness control and mini-group batching. Experiments show that these components improve training stability and downstream performance. EvoCUA-1.5 achieves 63.2\% success on OSWorld-Verified, outperforming comparable 32B/35B-scale open-weight baselines and even approaching models with significantly larger parameter counts. Overall, EvoCUA-1.5 provides a practical framework for scaling online RL in multi-turn computer-use agents.

</details>


### [213] [From Patterns to Maze Structures: SMT-Based Path Synthesis and 2D/3D Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09781)
*Shengyi Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于SMT（可满足性模理论）的管道流程，将输入图案（文本或形状）转化为迷宫结构，通过全局约束一次性求解路径合成问题，并支持平面自避行走路径与三维编织迷宫构建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的迷宫生成方法缺乏对任意输入图案（如文本、形状）的灵活支持，且难以同时保证路径的平面自避性与三维编织结构的可构造性。本文旨在通过SMT编码全局约束，实现从图案到迷宫的自动化合成。

Method: 将路径合成问题编码为SMT（可满足性模理论）的全局约束，包括邻接性、连续性和图案约束覆盖，对每个固定边界实例进行一次求解。生成的路径既可以是平面自避行走路线，也可以是具有指定上下交叉的分层遍历路径，并以此为基础构建平面迷宫和三维编织迷宫。

Result: 成功从输入图案（文本或形状）中合成出满足全局约束的路径，并实现了平面迷宫与三维编织迷宫的具体构建。论文扩展了Bridges 2026会议版本，提供了更多SMT-LIB代表性示例。

Conclusion: 基于SMT的全局约束编码方法能有效解决图案到迷宫的路径合成问题，生成的路径可作为平面和三维迷宫结构的脚手架，为图案驱动的迷宫生成提供了新的自动化解决方案。

Abstract: We present a pipeline for constructing maze structures from input patterns such as text or shapes. The central path-synthesis problem is encoded in Satisfiability Modulo Theories as global constraints on adjacency, continuity, and pattern-constrained coverage, allowing each fixed-bound instance to be solved in one call. The resulting path is either a planar, self-avoiding route or a layered traversal with prescribed over--under crossings, and it serves as a scaffold for constructing planar mazes and three-dimensional realizations of woven mazes. This report extends the published Bridges 2026 conference paper with more representative SMT-LIB examples and a fuller account of how synthesized paths become concrete maze constructions in planar and three-dimensional form.

</details>


### [214] [Length Penalties Make Chain-of-Thought Less Monitorable](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09786)
*Bryce Little*

Main category: cs.AI
