These results suggest that heuristic learning through coding agents constitutes a credible and complementary alternative to conventional reinforcement learning, combining competitive performance with physically interpretable controller representations. Prompts and source code are available at https://github.com/DonsetPG/fluid-heuristic-learning.

</details>


### [456] [Structure-Feature Aligned Graph Learning via Alternating Constrained Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11577)
*Chengcheng Yan,Qingsong Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种约束双视图节点预测框架，通过通道分离自适应门控GNN（CSAG-GNN）和独立锚定网络解耦特征变换与邻域聚合，在结构噪声和异配性连接下提升鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统GNN将特征变换与邻域聚合耦合，导致对拓扑噪声和异配性连接敏感，需要解耦这一依赖关系以提升模型鲁棒性。

Method: 1) 约束双视图框架：对齐结构条件GNN嵌入与锚定模型学习的无结构特征先验；2) 独立锚定网络：通过自监督重建目标捕获内在属性特征；3) CSAG-GNN：通过节点级门控机制在全局频谱平滑与局部空间判别之间动态路由表示；4) 稳定循环交替优化策略：解决耦合双层目标，防止训练中表示漂移。

Result: 在同配性和异配性基准上均取得了平衡的性能提升，并展现出结构鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效解耦了GNN中的特征-结构依赖，在多种图结构场景下均能稳定工作。

Abstract: We introduce a constrained two-view framework for node prediction that aligns structure-conditioned GNN embeddings with a structure-free feature prior learned by an anchor model. Conventional Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) couple feature transformation and neighborhood aggregation, which renders them vulnerable to topology noise and heterophilous connections. To decouple this dependency, our framework utilizes an independent anchor network to capture intrinsic attribute features via a self-supervised reconstruction objective. Furthermore, we propose a Channel-Split Adaptive Gated GNN (CSAG-GNN) that dynamically routes representations between global spectral smoothing and local spatial discrimination through a node-wise gating mechanism. We propose a stable cyclic alternating optimization strategy to solve the resulting coupled bi-level objective, preventing mutual representation drift during training. Empirical results on both homophilous and heterophilous benchmarks show balanced performance gains and structural robustness over competitive baselines.

</details>


### [457] [DiffEEG: A Self-Supervised Denoising Diffusion Model for Learning EEG Generic Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11578)
*Abdulkader Helwan,Lina Abou-Abbas,Hussein El Amouri,Belkacem Chikhaoui,Khadidja Henni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DiffEEG是一个9.6M参数的自监督基础模型，通过去噪扩散预训练和基于强化学习的微调，解决了EEG癫痫检测中的标注稀缺和类别极度不平衡问题，在患者级评估中实现81%的二元检测准确率和85%的加权F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在EEG癫痫检测中面临两个关键挑战：严重的标注稀缺和极端的类别不平衡（癫痫发作事件占临床记录不到10%），现有方法难以在标注数据有限的情况下同时应对这两个问题。

Method: 提出DiffEEG模型，包含三个关键设计：(1) 1.3M未标记段上进行去噪扩散预训练，使用1D U-Net+多头自注意力学习通用神经表示；(2) 基于强化学习的决策层，采用策略梯度优化直接最大化F1分数，优先关注罕见癫痫事件的敏感性；(3) 严格的患者独立留一折交叉验证（279名患者）。

Result: 四类癫痫亚型分类准确率61%、F1 59%；二元检测准确率81%、加权F1 85%；癫痫召回率59%（极端不平衡6.7%下）；段级评估上限准确率97.6%。

Conclusion: 扩散预训练结合基于度量的强化学习能够以最少的标注数据实现临床可用的癫痫监测。

Abstract: Deep learning for EEG-based seizure detection faces critical challenges: severe annotation scarcity and extreme class imbalance, where ictal events comprise less than 10\% of clinical recordings. We present DiffEEG, a 9.6M-parameter self-supervised foundation model that addresses both limitations through denoising diffusion pre-training and reinforcement learning (RL)-based fine-tuning. Pre-trained on 1.3M unlabeled segments from the Temple University Hospital Seizure Corpus (TUHSZ), DiffEEG learns generic neural representations via a 1D U-Net with multi-head self-attention. For downstream adaptation, a reinforced decision layer employs policy gradient optimization to directly maximize F1-score, prioritizing sensitivity to rare seizure events over overall accuracy. Under strict patient-wise evaluation (279 patients, Leave-One-Fold-Out), DiffEEG achieves 61\% accuracy and 59\% F1 for 4-class seizure subtyping, and 81\% accuracy with 85\% weighted F1 for binary detection, maintaining clinically viable seizure recall (59\%) despite extreme imbalance (6.7\% prevalence). Segment-level evaluation establishes an upper bound of 97.6\% accuracy, confirming strong architectural capacity. DiffEEG demonstrates that diffusion-based pre-training combined with metric-aware reinforcement learning enables clinically deployable seizure monitoring with minimal labeled data requirements.

</details>


### [458] [Privacy-Aware Collaborative and Distributed Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11600)
*Aditya Rane,Sathwik Yamana,Paritosh Ramanan,Srikanthan Ramesh,Akash Deep*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于分布式贝叶斯优化的协作元学习框架，证明梯度共享会泄露客户端观测数据，并评估了差分隐私防御的有效性及隐私-效用权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布式贝叶斯优化方法在保护原始数据的同时，未能充分评估梯度共享带来的隐私泄露风险，且缺乏对隐私保护机制的系统性分析。

Method: 构建协作元学习框架实现分布式贝叶斯优化；分析梯度共享机制下客户端观测数据的泄露程度；引入差分隐私防御机制并刻画其隐私-效用权衡关系。

Result: 证明梯度共享会导致客户端观测数据泄露，且泄露程度随搜索收敛和查询集中在最优值附近而加剧；差分隐私可缓解泄露但存在隐私-效用权衡。

Conclusion: 提出的框架能在无需原始数据交换的条件下匹配集中式性能，但需谨慎处理梯度共享带来的隐私风险，差分隐私提供了一种可调节的防护手段。

Abstract: We propose a collaborative meta-learning framework for distributed Bayesian optimization matching centralized performance without raw-data exchange. We show gradient sharing leaks client observations, with leakage worsening as the search converges and queries concentrate near the optimum. We evaluate a differentially private defense and characterize its privacy-utility trade-off.

</details>


### [459] [Fundamental Limitations of Fixed-Budget Best-Arm Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11635)
*Motti Goldberger*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明在固定预算的最佳臂识别问题中，任何自适应算法都无法在所有问题上匹配静态oracle的错误衰减率，对于K≥3且奖励来自单参数自然指数族的情况，最坏情况下的衰减率至多为静态oracle的(1 + log(K)/8)^(-1)倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究构建了多种自适应算法，其采样比例收敛于静态oracle的最优比例，但能否在所有问题实例上一致匹配静态oracle的错误衰减率一直是悬而未决的问题。本文旨在回答这一开放性问题。

Method: 通过构造反例，利用信息论下界技术，证明对任何算法都存在至少一个实例，其错误衰减率严格低于静态oracle。具体地，对于K≥3且奖励分布来自单参数自然指数族，给出了衰减率比值的上界(1+log(K)/8)^(-1)。

Result: 任何自适应算法都无法在所有实例上匹配静态oracle的错误衰减率。对于K≥3，最坏情况下的衰减率至多为静态oracle的(1+log(K)/8)^(-1)倍。这同时回答了Qin (2022)提出的开放问题，表明固定预算最佳臂识别不具有复杂性（complexity）。

Conclusion: 固定预算最佳臂识别问题中，自适应算法与静态oracle之间存在不可消除的性能差距，该问题不具备统一的复杂性度量。

Abstract: In fixed-budget best-arm identification, also known as ranking and selection, an algorithm has a sampling budget to distribute across $K$ arms. Each sample provides noisy feedback about that arm's mean, and the goal is to identify the arm with the largest mean. A common performance benchmark is the static oracle: a non-adaptive strategy that knows the means in advance and chooses fixed sampling proportions to maximize the exponential decay rate of the probability of incorrect identification. Several adaptive algorithms have been constructed such that their sampling proportions converge to the static oracle proportions. However, it has remained open whether any algorithm could match the static oracle's error decay rate uniformly across all problem instances. We answer this in the negative. For any $K\ge 3$ and for rewards drawn from any one-parameter natural exponential family, we show that for any algorithm, there is at least one instance where the error decay rate is at most $\left(1 + \frac{\log(K)}{8}\right)^{-1}$ times that of the static oracle. This also answers the open question posed by Qin (2022), showing that fixed-budget best-arm identification does not admit a complexity.

</details>


### [460] [Bet on Features: Anytime-Valid and Feature-Aware Auditing of Conditional Quantile Forecasters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11653)
*Ivane Antonov,Sohom Mukherjee,Richard Pibernik,Yo Joong Choe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个无分布、基于博弈论的连续审计框架，用于在黑盒条件分位数预测器上检测其校准性。该框架无需i.i.d.假设，能够根据审计者不同的信息集（特征粒度）区分不同的校准概念，并针对可预测的备择假设提供有限时间检测保证。实验表明流行的时序预测器Chronos-2在多个相关特征上严重失准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有条件分位数预测器的回溯检验方法存在三个关键不足：一是数据流漂移和机制变化使得固定时间窗口的回溯检验无效；二是现有检验未考虑校准概念取决于审计者信息集的粒度，即一个预测器在粗信息下看似校准，但在丰富信息下可能失准；三是缺乏对非i.i.d.损失序列的连续监控方法。

Method: 1) 形式化定义了不同信息集下的条件分位数校准概念；2) 识别了审计者能获得检测功效的备择假设集合；3) 针对特征线性上下文的赌博策略，推导出非i.i.d.假设下的有限时间检测保证；4) 构建了具有特征层面可解释性的证据过程。

Result: 理论层面给出了不同信息粒度下校准检测的难度刻画，以及针对特定备择假设的有限时间检测保证。实证层面发现Chronos-2时序预测器在多个相关特征上存在显著的失准现象。

Conclusion: 信息集粒度决定了分位数校准检验的难度，所提出的博弈论框架能够在特征层面提供细粒度的失准证据，且无需i.i.d.假设，适用于数据流漂移场景下的连续监控。

Abstract: Black-box conditional quantile forecasts are widely used for sequential decisions under asymmetric costs, such as inventory planning in supply chain management. Once deployed, such forecasters must be monitored continuously as data streams drift and regimes change; this invalidates standard, fixed-horizon backtests for calibration. Further, existing backtests do not take into account that the notion of calibration is, in fact, information-dependent: forecasts can look calibrated to an auditor with coarse information while being miscalibrated to an auditor with richer information. We develop a distribution-free and game-theoretic testing framework for continuously auditing black-box conditional quantile forecasters with non-i.i.d. losses, such that the resulting evidence process is powerful against predictably chosen alternatives specified by the features available to the auditor. We first formalize notions of conditional quantile calibration when different sets of features are available to the auditor, establishing that the coarseness of the auditor's information set determines the hardness of the testing problem. We then identify the sets of alternatives for which the auditor can achieve power, and focusing on contextual bets linear in the features, we derive finite-time detection guarantees for such alternatives, all without an i.i.d. assumption. The resulting evidence processes are interpretable at the feature level, as they quantify fine-grained, "feature-aware" evidence for miscalibration. We empirically validate these methods on simulated and real data, finding that a popular time series forecaster (Chronos-2) is highly miscalibrated w.r.t. multiple relevant features.

</details>


### [461] [How to Tame Grokking: Representation Geometry as a Control Signal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11666)
*Maksim A Kazanskii*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现神经网络的"Grokking"现象（延迟泛化）与表征空间的维度坍塌密切相关，并提出GeomDR正则化方法，通过调控隐藏表征的几何维度来加速泛化，最高可达52倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Grokking现象已被广泛研究，但影响其出现和时机的因素仍不完全清楚，本文旨在探索表征几何与延迟泛化之间的关系。

Method: 通过分析表征维度坍塌与Grokking发生的时间关联，提出Geometric Dimensionality Regularization (GeomDR)——一种基于谱分析的简单正则化方法，在训练过程中动态调整隐藏表征的有效维度。

Result: 在模加法、模除法和置换组合任务中，GeomDR一致地改变了Grokking动态，可大幅加速泛化 onset，最高达标准AdamW训练的52倍；在多层感知机和Transformer中观察到类似的效果。

Conclusion: 表征几何可作为Grokking的有效控制信号，几何干预为研究和影响神经网络延迟泛化提供了一种实用方法。

Abstract: Grokking is a phenomenon in which neural networks initially memorize training data and only later exhibit strong generalization after prolonged optimization. Despite extensive recent study, the factors influencing the emergence and timing of grokking remain incompletely understood. We investigate the relationship between representation geometry and delayed generalization. We find that dimensionality collapse consistently precedes the onset of grokking in all evaluated settings. Motivated by these observations, we introduce Geometric Dimensionality Regularization (GeomDR), a simple spectral regularizer that modifies the effective dimensionality of hidden representations during training. Across modular addition, modular division, and permutation composition tasks, GeomDR consistently alters grokking dynamics and can substantially accelerate the onset of generalization depending on the intervention schedule and target dimensionality. In several settings, grokking is accelerated by up to 52 times relative to standard AdamW training. Similar qualitative effects are observed in both multilayer perceptrons and transformers. Together, these results suggest that representation geometry can serve as an effective control signal for grokking and provide evidence that geometric interventions offer a practical approach for studying and influencing delayed generalization in neural networks.

</details>


### [462] [A multi-scale feature enhanced graph neural network for fluid dynamics prediction in complex geometries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11672)
*Li Xiao,Tianyu Li,Yiye Zou,Mingjie Zhang,Xiaogangd Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出多尺度特征增强图神经网络(ME-GNN)，通过两步消息传递机制、注意力U-Net均匀网格离散化和K-hop子图采样，在三个基准数据集上实现了流体动力学仿真的最先进性能，速度场相对L2误差低至0.0196。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值仿真计算成本高，GNN在处理复杂几何和大规模网格时面临挑战，需要更高效的深度学习方法来加速流体动力学仿真。

Method: 提出ME-GNN模型：1)两步消息传递机制捕获局部细节特征；2)结合注意力U-Net与均匀网格离散化提取粗细多尺度特征；3)采用K-hop采样构建子图实现大规模数据集高效训练。

Result: ShapeNet-Car速度场相对L2误差0.0196、表面压力0.0556；AirfRANS流场归一化均方误差0.0033；DrivAerNet表面压力相对L2误差0.1416。

Conclusion: ME-GNN通过多尺度特征增强有效解决了GNN在复杂几何和大规模网格上的局限性，在多个流体动力学基准上达到最优性能。

Abstract: Industrial design in fields such as vehicle and aerospace engineering often relies on large-scale numerical simulations to evaluate fluid dynamics performance, which can incur substantial computational costs. Deep neural networks have shown promise in improving simulation efficiency, especially graph neural networks (GNNs), which demonstrate great potential due to their flexibility with unstructured data. However, GNNs face challenges when dealing with tasks involving complex geometries and large-scale meshes. In this paper, we propose the Multi-scale Feature Enhanced Graph Neural Network (ME-GNN) to tackle these challenges. ME-GNN employs a graph neural network with a two-step message-passing mechanism to capture detailed local features effectively. Additionally, it integrates an Attention U-Net with uniform grid discretization, enabling the extraction of both fine and coarse features. The model also utilizes K-hop sampling to construct subgraphs, facilitating efficient training on large datasets while preserving detailed local features. We evaluated ME-GNN on three benchmark datasets and achieved state-of-the-art results: a relative L2 error of 0.0196 for the velocity field and 0.0556 for the surface pressure on ShapeNet-Car, a normalized mean squared error of 0.0033 for the flow field on AirfRANS, and a relative L2 error of 0.1416 for the surface pressure on DrivAerNet.

</details>


### [463] [CatRetriever: Contrastive Representation Learning for Slab-to-Bulk Retrieval in Generative Catalyst Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11712)
*Jungho Oh,Woosung Kim,Dong Hyeon Mok,Jonggeol Na,Seoin Back*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CatRetriever，一种基于对比表示学习的模型，用于将催化剂表面（slab）结构与对应的体相（bulk）结构在共享潜空间中对齐，从而解决表面生成模型中缺失体相信息的问题。该模型在检索任务中达到R@1>91%、R@3>98%的准确率，并扩展为吸附能目标体相发现流程，实现从表面到体相的可扩展催化剂发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的催化剂表面生成模型仅生成slab级别的催化剂-吸附质结构，无法提供对应的体相（bulk）结构信息，导致难以评估依赖于体相的性质，如形成能、表面能、晶体对称性和可合成性。因此，需要建立slab到bulk的映射关系。

Method: 采用对比表示学习（contrastive representation learning）方法，将slab和bulk的晶体表示在共享潜空间中对齐，将slab到bulk的对应问题转化为检索问题。CatRetriever通过对比学习训练，使匹配的slab-bulk对在潜空间中靠近，不匹配的对远离。

Result: 在分布内和保留测试集上，CatRetriever的检索性能达到R@1>91%、R@3>98%。扩展后的吸附能目标体相发现流程能够结合体相检索、生成式搜索空间扩展和吸附能分布分析，评估候选体的结构兼容性和目标吸附能可达性。

Conclusion: CatRetriever为连接催化剂表面生成模型与物理合理、吸附能兼容的体相催化剂发现提供了可扩展的途径，弥补了当前表面生成模型缺乏体相信息的缺陷。

Abstract: Inverse design is an emerging data-driven paradigm for efficiently navigating vast chemical spaces to discover new materials with targeted properties, and in the context of heterogeneous catalysis, surface generative models have recently advanced this goal by directly generating catalyst surface-adsorbate structures. However, these models typically operate at the slab level and do not provide the corresponding parent bulk structure, making it difficult to assess bulk-dependent properties such as formation energy, surface energy, crystallographic symmetry, and synthesizability. Here, we address this missing slab-to-bulk connection as a retrieval problem and introduce CatRetriever, a contrastive representation learning model that aligns slab and bulk crystal representations in a shared latent space. From a slab query, CatRetriever accurately retrieves plausible parent bulk candidates with R@1 > 91% and R@3 > 98% on both the in-distribution and holdout evaluation sets. We further extend the CatRetriever framework into an adsorption energy targeted bulk discovery pipeline that combines bulk retrieval, generative search space expansion, and adsorption energy distribution analysis. This workflow evaluates candidates by both structural compatibility with the query slab and their ability to access the target adsorption energy range across diverse surface environments. CatRetriever therefore provides a scalable route for connecting catalyst generative models with physically plausible and adsorption energy compatible bulk catalyst discovery.

</details>


### [464] [Active Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11720)
*Alper Kamil Bozkurt,Shangtong Zhang,Yuichi Motai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次研究离线到在线强化学习（O2O-RL）中的有限交互预算下主动策略选择微调问题，提出基于上置信界（UCB）的平衡策略评估与微调分配的方法，实验表明该方法优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准O2O-RL管道在离线阶段训练多个候选策略后，通常只选择单个策略进行微调，但微调性能对算法和超参数高度敏感。现有方法缺乏在有限在线交互预算下如何主动选择策略进行微调的研究，导致资源浪费或次优策略被选中。

Method: 将问题形式化为在线交互在策略评估与策略微调之间的权衡分配，提出基于未来性能上置信界（UCB）的主动策略选择方法，该置信界通过拟合局部线性性能预测模型（基于在线评估观测数据）推导得出。

Result: 在多样化的实验场景中，所提方法一致优于现有O2O-RL基线方法。

Conclusion: 主动选择并微调策略比固定单一策略或均分预算更有效地利用有限在线交互预算，推动离线RL向实际高风险/高成本场景部署迈进。

Abstract: Background: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) enables effective policies to be trained from large, previously collected datasets and subsequently improved through limited online interaction. This offline-to-online RL (O2O-RL) paradigm is particularly promising in nonstationary domains where interaction is costly or potentially hazardous. Standard O2O-RL pipelines train multiple candidate policies offline, evaluate them using off-policy or online evaluation, and then deploy and fine-tune the policy with the highest estimated value. However, as in offline pretraining, fine-tuning performance is highly sensitive to the choice of algorithm and hyperparameters, making it risky to commit to a single policy. Objectives: We study active policy selection for fine-tuning under a limited interaction budget in O2O-RL settings. To our knowledge, this is the first work to address this problem. Methods: We formulate the problem by identifying a fundamental trade-off between allocating online interactions to policy evaluation, which helps identify high-performing policies, and allocating them to fine-tuning, which improves policy performance. We then propose an approach that balances this trade-off by actively selecting policies for fine-tuning based on upper-confidence bounds on their future performance. These bounds are derived from locally linear performance forecasts fitted to observations obtained through online evaluation. Results: Across a diverse range of experiments, the proposed approach consistently outperforms existing O2O-RL baselines. Conclusions: Actively selecting and fine-tuning policies uses limited online interaction budgets more effectively than either committing to a single policy or dividing the budget equally among all policies. Our framework also advances offline RL toward practical deployment in real-world systems where online interaction is costly or risky.

</details>


### [465] [Time-Lag-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling in PPVC Module Factories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11725)
*Ziheng Zhang,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对预制装配式建筑中混凝土养护、防水测试、油漆干燥等工序产生的长时间滞后问题，本文通过三项最小侵入式扩展（滞后感知动态、预期滞后特征通道、活性掩码嵌入）改进了双注意力深度强化学习求解器，使其在基准实例上优于所有调度规则和遗传算法，逼近约束规划参考解（约4%差距），且无需求解器参与，可秒级重规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预制装配式建筑在模块化工厂的柔性作业车间中存在显著的后操作时间滞后（如混凝土养护、防水测试、油漆干燥），这些滞后平均使最优参考完工时间膨胀约67%，且忽视滞后的修复策略比所有调度规则更差，亟需有效的集成滞后感知的调度方法。

Method: 基于双注意力深度强化学习求解器，提出三项最小侵入式扩展：(1) 滞后感知动态与可接受奖励边界；(2) 两个预期滞后特征通道；(3) 活性掩码操作类型与工位类型嵌入。所有扩展可单独消融，禁用时完全复现原求解器。

Result: 在基于官方国家预制指南的基准实例上，学习策略达到约4%的约束规划参考差距，优于所有调度规则和遗传算法元启发式，优势在产能竞争下扩大；单一混合规模策略在训练范围内保持领先；可在数秒内完成中断后重规划。

Conclusion: 所提方法无需求解器或模型许可，是当前最强的无求解器调度器；若可部署精确求解器，则其仍是质量上限，本文明确刻画了这一边界。

Abstract: Prefabricated prefinished volumetric construction moves most building work into module factories, whose production floor operates as a flexible job shop. A major complication is decisive: long post-operation time-lags caused by concrete curing, watertightness ponding tests, and paint drying, during which a module is blocked while its workstation stays free. On benchmark instances grounded in an official national prefabrication guidebook, these lags inflate even the optimal reference makespan by about 67% on average, and ignoring them at decision time, then repairing to feasibility, is worse than every dispatching rule. We adapt a state-of-the-art dual-attention deep reinforcement learning solver through three minimally invasive, individually ablatable extensions: lag-aware dynamics with an admissible reward bound, two anticipatory lag feature channels, and liveness-masked operation- and station-type embeddings. With every extension disabled the implementation reproduces the original solver exactly, so all gains are attributable to the adaptations. We release a public, guidebook-grounded benchmark generator. On held-out instances the learned policy is the strongest solver-free scheduler: it reaches within about 4% of a constraint-programming reference and beats every dispatching rule and a genetic-algorithm metaheuristic, with its advantage widening under capacity contention, and a single size-mixed policy carries this lead across the trained range of factory sizes. It needs no solver, model, or license in the loop and re-plans within seconds of a disruption; where an exact solver can be deployed, that solver remains the quality ceiling, a boundary we map explicitly.

</details>


### [466] [HiFi-LLP: High-Fidelity, Low-Cost Latency Predictors with Confidence for Robust HW-NAS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11746)
*Shambhavi Balamuthu Sampath,Behzad Shomali,Nael Fasfous,Moritz Thoma,Judeson Anthony Fernando,Lukas Frickenstein,Pierpaolo Mori,Manoj Rohit Vemparala,Alexander Frickenstein,Walter Stechele*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HiFi-LLP，一种基于图注意力网络的高保真低代价延迟预测器，并设计混合NAS框架，通过置信度机制将低置信度预测路由至硬件在环测量，在保持竞争性Pareto前沿的同时实现最高8.6倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 硬件感知的DNN优化（如HW-aware压缩和HW-NAS）依赖硬件在环（HIL）延迟反馈，但HIL的串行测量成为瓶颈；现有的延迟预测器存在平台专用样本需求大（数万级）和预测不准确误导NAS的问题。

Method: 提出HiFi-LLP，基于图注意力网络（GAT）构建延迟预测器，并引入置信度度量；进一步设计混合NAS框架，将低置信度预测路由回HIL测量，高置信度预测直接使用，平衡准确性与效率。

Result: 在LatBench数据集的6个设备上，HiFi-LLP在10%准确率边界内优于先前平台专用预测器最多9个百分点，Spearman秩相关系数达0.996；混合NAS框架相比典型NAS实现最高8.6倍加速，且保持竞争性Pareto前沿。

Conclusion: HiFi-LLP以低成本实现了高保真的延迟预测，结合混合NAS框架有效缓解了硬件感知NAS中HIL瓶颈问题，为边缘设备上的高效DNN部署提供了实用方案。

Abstract: With deep neural networks (DNNs) increasingly deployed on edge devices, hardware (HW)-aware optimization techniques--such as HW-aware compression and HW-aware neural architecture search (HW-NAS)--have become essential. These methods rely on real feedback from the target hardware to tailor DNN architectures for efficient deployment. While the search can be parallelized, latency measurements via hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) remain a bottleneck due to their sequential nature. Recent approaches use latency predictors to replace costly HIL feedback, but challenges persist: (1) platform-specific predictors often require tens of thousands of samples, and (2) inaccurate predictions can mislead the NAS process. To address this, we introduce HiFi-LLP, a high-fidelity, low-cost latency predictor based on graph attention networks, augmented with a confidence metric. HiFi-LLP outperforms prior platform-specific predictors by up to 9 percentage points (p.p.) in the 10% accuracy bound and achieves a Spearman's rank correlation of up to 0.996 across six devices in the LatBench dataset. We further propose a hybrid NAS framework that routes low-confidence predictions to HIL, achieving up to 8.6$\times$ speedup compared to typical NAS while maintaining a competitive Pareto front.

</details>


### [467] [From Global to Factor-Wise Expert Composition in Discrete Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11758)
*Haozhe Huang,Yudong Xu,Abhijoy Mandal,Alán Aspuru-Guzik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FactorDiff框架，通过将样本分解为更小的因子并在采样过程中动态路由到最相关的专家，解决了离散扩散模型在组合生成中忽略专家空间/功能特化的问题，在ARC-AGI基准上验证了因子级路由优于全局标量加权方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散模型的组合生成方法在每样本基础上工作，将生成状态整体处理，忽略了不同专家可能具有的空间或功能特化，限制了组合生成的能力。

Method: 提出FactorDiff框架，将样本分解为更小的因子，在采样过程中动态地将每个因子路由到最相关的专家，并实例化为空间/像素级组合。

Result: 在ARC-AGI基准上，简单的因子特定路由方法持续优于复杂的全局标量加权方案，尤其是在需要逻辑一致性和空间解耦的任务上。

Conclusion: 因子级分解与动态路由是提升离散扩散模型组合生成能力的有效途径，能更好地利用不同专家的特化能力。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion models offer a powerful framework for solving complex reasoning tasks, particularly through compositional generation, which combines multiple pre-trained experts to generalize beyond their individual training data. Recent theoretical corrections introduce time-dependent mixing weights to better align composed diffusion dynamics with the intended target. However, these methods are fundamentally limited by working on a per-sample basis, treating each generated state monolithically and ignoring the potential spatial or functional specializations of different experts. In this work, we address this limitation by proposing FactorDiff - a factor-wise composition framework for diffusion models. We posit that samples can be further decomposed into smaller factors, and propose a sampling process that dynamically routes each factor to the most relevant expert. We instantiate this framework with spatial/pixel-level compositions and validate it on the ARC-AGI benchmark, demonstrating that simple factor-specific routing consistently outperforms complex global scalar weighting schemes on tasks that require logical consistency and spatial disentanglement.

</details>


### [468] [From Expressivity to Sample Complexity: Narrow Teachers for Transformers via C-RASP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11760)
*Michael Rizvi-Martel,Satwik Bhattamishra,Guillaume Rabusseau,Michael Hahn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对Transformer的理论理解问题，提出了一种初步的样本复杂度界限，用于学习C-RASP构造，从而在可学习性方面填补了现有理论工作的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大量工作通过手工构建权重或计算复杂性论证来分析Transformer的表达能力，但很少有研究关注这些解的可学习性（即模型能否通过训练从数据中学习到这些解）。

Method: 受近期损失景观分析工作的启发，提出了学习C-RASP构造的样本复杂度界限。

Result: 初步建立了Transformer学习C-RASP构造的样本复杂度界限。

Conclusion: 在理解Transformer的可学习性方面取得了进展，为未来更深入的理论分析奠定了基础。

Abstract: A theoretical understanding of Transformers is crucial to better understand the capacities and limitations of large language models (LLMs). There is much work analyzing the expressivity of attention-based models. By proposing handcrafted weights or using computational complexity arguments, a large amount of past theoretical works have sought to characterize which tasks are and which are not in the hypothesis class of Transformer models. However, little work investigates the learnability of such solutions. In this work, we make progress towards this goal. Inspired by recent loss landscape analysis work, we propose preliminary sample complexity bounds for learning C-RASP constructions with Transformers.

</details>


### [469] [An Exact Instrument for State Usage in Selective State-Space Models, and the Input-Driven Migration It Reveals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11796)
*Raktim Bhattacharya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对选择性状态空间模型（如Mamba）提出了一种精确测量模式使用情况的工具，发现训练后的模型会根据输入重新分配状态空间，其中输入依赖的写映射$B_t$主导了这种迁移，而时间步长几乎不贡献。基于此的输入调度剪枝在多个规模上优于静态方法，在半预算下匹配未剪枝模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法无法精确测量Mamba等选择性状态空间模型中各模式（模态）的实际贡献，缺乏理解模型如何利用其状态空间的工具。

Method: 利用状态矩阵对角化的特性，将每个通道的输出精确分解为每个模式的贡献，构建每（层、通道、窗口）的Gram张量，可精确计算任意模式子集丢弃后的输出误差。该方法在Mamba-1上是精确的，在Mamba-2上也是近似的。通过冻结信号的反事实分析，分离了$B_t$和$\Delta_t$对模式迁移的贡献。

Result: 验证中与参考实现的相对误差为$2.3\times10^{-7}$；在Mamba-1家族（130M-2.8B）、Falcon-Mamba 7B和Mamba-2上，发现模式使用随输入迁移，$B_t$是迁移的主要原因，$\Delta_t$几乎无贡献。基于输入调度的剪枝在所有规模上优于静态方法，在半预算下匹配未剪枝模型。

Conclusion: 选择性状态空间模型存在可挖掘的冗余，通过感知输入的剪枝策略可以高效利用状态空间，存在进一步优化的空间。

Abstract: Selective state-space models such as Mamba route information through a bank of first-order modes whose input coupling is set by a learned selection mechanism. We give an exact instrument for measuring how a trained model uses these modes. Because the state matrix is diagonal, each channel's output decomposes exactly into per-mode contributions, and a per-(layer, channel, window) Gram tensor yields the exact output error of dropping any subset of modes, offline, at any budget. Validated against the reference implementation to a relative error of $2.3\times10^{-7}$ on the Mamba-1 family where it is exact, the instrument predicts a layer's deployed pruning error to a median relative deviation of $5\times10^{-7}$ over $4{,}464$ configurations, its floor set by the reconstruction. Applying the instrument across the Mamba-1 family (130M--2.8B), the deployed 7B Falcon-Mamba, and Mamba-2, we find that trained models re-allocate their state space with the input: which modes carry the signal migrates across contexts, and at the most affected layers a per-input oracle roughly halves the output error of a fixed mode set. Frozen-signal counterfactuals attribute the migration primarily to the input-dependent write map $B_t$; the timestep usually identified with selectivity carries almost none of it. Input-scheduled mode pruning on this measurement outperforms static, Hankel-based, and layer-adaptive rankings at every scale from 130M to the deployed 7B Falcon-Mamba, and at half the state budget it matches the unpruned model. Because the scheduler reads each window's mode usage from a first pass, this demonstrates realizable headroom; we claim no deployed compute or memory saving.

</details>


### [470] [Relaxing Faithfulness with Intervention-Only Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11816)
*Bijan Mazaheri,Jiaqi Zhang,Caroline Uhler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出传统因果发现算法依赖的 faithfulness 假设在存在路径抵消（缓冲/稳定机制）时会被违反，导致错误移除因果依赖。作者提出干预即时忠实性（intervention-immediacy faithfulness）这一更温和的假设，允许路径抵消，并证明结合硬干预可非参数识别因果结构。主张将干预作为因果信息的主要载体，优先于条件独立性检验，并给出了识别条件不满足时的等价类定义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统因果发现算法依赖于 faithfulness 假设（因果关联必然导致统计依赖），但许多自然系统中存在相互抵消的缓冲/稳定路径（路径抵消），导致 faithfulness 被违反，算法错误地移除真实因果边。作者希望解决这一核心矛盾，提供一种在路径抵消存在下仍能正确识别因果结构的方法。

Method: 提出 intervention-immediacy faithfulness 假设（仅要求干预与直接效应之间保持依赖，允许路径抵消存在），结合硬干预数据，在非参数框架下进行因果结构识别。证明在该假设下，硬干预足以唯一确定因果方向，不再依赖条件独立性检验的第一阶段。当识别条件不充分时，给出相应的等价类刻画。

Result: 证明了 intervention-immediacy faithfulness 假设足以在存在路径抵消（违反传统 faithfulness）时，通过硬干预非参数地识别因果结构。指出传统 workflow 中条件独立性检验阶段可能误导，干预信息应作为主要依据。

Conclusion: 因果发现应转换范式：以干预（而非条件独立性）作为因果信息的主要载体。干预 immediacy faithfulness 是一个更现实、更鲁棒的假设。当干预范围有限时，仍可通过等价类进行部分识别。

Abstract: Causal discovery algorithms learn a network that describes the causal dependencies among random variables. A common workflow involves first utilizing conditional independence properties on observational data to determine partially directed causal relationships, then applying interventions to orient the unknown causal directions. A critical assumption for the first step is faithfulness: a requirement that causally linked variables exhibit statistical dependence. Many natural systems include buffering and stabilizing pathways that cancel out to achieve systemic robustness. This cancellation of pathways violates faithfulness, leading causal discovery algorithms to incorrectly remove causal dependencies. In this paper, we argue that hard interventions contain information about the presence/absence of causal linkage that is overlooked in the first stage of structure discovery. We show that a mild assumption -- called intervention-immediacy faithfulness -- that allows cancellations, is sufficient to nonparametrically identify causal structures with hard interventions. These results position interventions as the primary carriers of information about causal structure, which should take precedence over conditional independence testing. To flip the paradigm, we also specify equivalence classes when the identification criteria are not met due to limitations in the scope of interventions.

</details>


### [471] [Transformer-Guided Swarm Intelligence for Frugal Neural Architecture Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11826)
*Romain Amigon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合强化学习Transformer控制器与人工蜂群算法的节俭模因NAS框架，能在消费级GPU（RTX 3060）上3小时内搜索到高效架构，在CIFAR-10上达到84.85%准确率（仅17.4万参数），并在信用卡欺诈检测任务上优化F1分数至0.71（仅4600参数）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NAS需要大量计算资源（数千GPU天），阻碍了其在消费级硬件上的普及。本文旨在民主化架构设计，使研究者和从业者能在普通硬件上高效进行NAS。

Method: 提出一种混合NAS框架，结合自回归Transformer控制器（经RL训练）进行全局宏搜索，与人工蜂群（ABC）算法进行局部微挖掘；引入动态熵机制防止RL阶段早熟收敛；通过算法惩罚网络深度来抑制模型膨胀。

Result: 在RTX 3060上3小时搜索出CIFAR-10架构，84.85%准确率、17.4万参数（远小于ResNet-20）；在信用卡欺诈检测任务上F1达0.71，仅4600参数。

Conclusion: 该方法能产出高效、可定制、参数效率极高的深度学习模型，适合边缘部署，实现了NAS在消费级硬件上的民主化。

Abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has automated the design of deep learning models but traditionally requires massive computational resources, often measured in thousands of GPU-days. In this paper, we propose a frugal and memetic NAS framework designed to democratize architecture design on consumer-grade hardware. Our approach combines the global macro-search capabilities of an autoregressive Transformer controller, trained via Reinforcement Learning (RL), with the local micro-exploitation of an Artificial Bee Colony (ABC) algorithm. To prevent premature convergence during the RL phase, we introduce a dynamic entropy mechanism that forces topological exploration upon detection of performance stagnation. Evaluated on a standard GPU (NVIDIA RTX 3060), our hybrid method effectively resolves the "cold-start" problem inherent in metaheuristics. By algorithmically penalizing network depth, our framework actively mitigates model bloat: on the CIFAR-10 dataset, it discovers an efficient architecture reaching 84.85% accuracy with only $\sim$174,000 parameters (significantly smaller than standard baselines like ResNet-20) in 3 hours of search time. Furthermore, we demonstrate the framework's flexibility by applying it to credit card fraud detection, directly optimizing the F1-Score on highly imbalanced tabular data to reach a F1-Score of 0.71 with a compact network of $\sim$4,600 parameters. These results suggest that our approach can yield tailored, accessible, and highly parameter-efficient deep learning models suitable for edge deployment.

</details>


### [472] [Inside the Unfair Judge: A Mechanistic Interpretability Account of LLM-as-Judge Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11871)
*Zixiang Xu,Sixian Li,Huaxing Liu,Xiang Wang,Shuai Li,Zirui Song,Xiuying Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 现有LLM-as-judge评分偏差研究主要停留在输入输出层面，本文从表征层面（隐藏状态）揭示偏差的几何结构，发现偏差沿低维特定子空间分布，通过因果控制可双向调节评分，且线性投影到偏差方向特征可预测法官在未见基准上的失败，效果优于文本方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅在输入输出层面研究LLM评判者的评分偏差，缺乏对偏差在模型内部表征层面的理解，本文旨在从隐藏状态空间揭示偏差的几何结构及其操作价值。

Method: 跨7个评判模型、7种偏差类型、9个基准，采用三种估计器家族分析激活几何；通过因果控制在偏差子空间进行正向/逆向调控；使用线性投影到偏差方向特征预测未见基准上的评判失败。

Result: 1）偏差输入沿低维特定类型子空间偏移，该子空间随深度锐化且被三种估计器一致恢复；2）沿该子空间进行因果控制可双向驱动评分，正向复现偏差评分，逆向恢复基线评分，随机方向效果弱一个数量级；3）线性投影到偏差方向特征可预测三个完全未见基准上的评判失败，显著优于基于文本的方法。

Conclusion: 将偏差视为激活几何而非输入输出噪声，统一了几何结构、因果控制与操作预测于单一框架，为理解和缓解LLM评判者偏差提供了新的表征层面视角。

Abstract: Existing studies of LLM-as-judge scoring bias work predominantly at the input-output level: they perturb inputs, measure score deltas, and propose prompt-level mitigations. We argue that the same biases admit a representation-level account in the judge's hidden state, complementary to the input-output view and operationally useful in ways it does not afford. We report three findings, across seven judges, seven bias types, and nine benchmarks. Geometry: baseline judging inputs occupy a tight activation manifold while biased inputs are displaced along a low-dimensional, type-specific subspace that sharpens with depth and is recovered consistently by three families of estimators. Causal control: steering hidden states along this subspace drives scoring in both directions, forward shifts reproducing biased scoring on clean inputs and reverse shifts restoring baseline scoring on biased ones, while matched-norm random directions produce shifts an order of magnitude smaller. Operational: a simple linear projection onto the same bias-direction features anticipates judge failures on three entirely unseen benchmarks, substantially outperforming text-based alternatives. Reading bias as activation geometry, rather than as input-output noise, unifies geometric structure, causal control, and operational prediction within a single framework. The project page is available at https://xzx34.github.io/unfair-judge/

</details>


### [473] [Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11875)
*Tiberiu Musat,Tiago Pimentel,Nicholas Zucchet,Thomas Hofmann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个理论框架，解释Transformer语言模型中归纳推理能力的涌现机制。通过定义一类统一的归纳任务，证明了注意力模型训练动力学可被限制在高度可解释的低维不变流形上，从而用少量可解释坐标而非数百万参数捕捉学习动态。该框架刻画了数据统计如何控制上下文学习与权重学习之间的竞争、随机初始化如何决定胜出的电路，并利用流形坐标自动检测训练模型中学到的电路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前关于Transformer学习动力学的研究大多局限于特定任务，缺乏统一的理论框架来解释归纳推理能力的涌现机制。

Method: 定义了一类统一的归纳任务（包括上下文n-gram和多跳推理等），理论上证明了注意力模型训练动力学可被限制在低维不变流形上，使得学习动态仅由少量可解释坐标描述。

Result: 1）刻画了数据统计如何控制上下文学习与权重学习之间的竞争；2）揭示了随机初始化如何决定多个可能解中胜出的电路；3）展示了流形坐标可用于自动检测训练模型中学到的电路。

Conclusion: 通过将电路形成视为低维动力学现象，该工作向构建Transformer学习的预测性理论迈出了重要一步。

Abstract: We present a theoretical framework to explain the emergence of inductive reasoning abilities in Transformer language models. While previous works on Transformer learning dynamics have so far been mostly tied to specific tasks, we study a generalized class of inductive tasks that unifies several synthetic tasks known in the literature, including in-context n-grams and multi-hop reasoning. In this class, we theoretically prove that the training dynamics of attention models can be confined to a highly interpretable, low-dimensional invariant manifold. On this manifold, the learning dynamics are captured by a handful of interpretable coordinates rather than millions of parameters, making both theoretical and empirical analysis more tractable. Using this framework, we characterize how data statistics govern the competition between in-context and in-weights learning, we study how random initializations determine the `winning' circuit when multiple solutions are possible, and we demonstrate that the coordinate frame associated with the manifold can be used to automatically detect which circuits have been learned in trained models. By casting circuit formation as a low-dimensional dynamical phenomenon, we take a step toward a predictive theory of how Transformers learn.

</details>


### [474] [Requential Coding: Pushing the Limits of Model Compression with Self-Generated Training Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11883)
*Shikai Qiu,Marc Finzi,Yujia Zheng,Kun Zhang,Andrew Gordon Wilson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"requential coding"方法，通过教师模型从学生自身分布中选择训练样本进行编码，实现与参数数量和数据熵无关的压缩长度，在十亿参数大语言模型上取得了最优的泛化保证，并揭示了模型规模、压缩率与可学习信息之间的深层关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有压缩方法存在根本性局限：基于参数的方法（如量化）的编码长度与模型规模成正比，无法反映参数实际存储的信息量；而prequential coding虽绕过参数规模问题，但需对完整数据序列编码，当数据熵较高时编码长度巨大。亟需一种能真正反映模型所学内容的压缩方法。

Method: 提出requential coding框架：教师模型从学生自身分布中挑选训练样本，学生仅对这些被选中的样本进行编码。编码长度仅产生于教师与学生预测不一致的样本上，从而使得码长与参数数量和数据熵均无关。

Result: 1) Requential code长度通常比prequential code短数个数量级，且优势随规模增长而扩大；2) 在固定损失下，更大模型和集成模型尽管参数更多，但压缩后尺寸反而更小；3) 应用于PAC-Bayes界，在十亿参数LLM上取得了最优泛化保证，超越基于极端后训练量化的界限；4) 界限在计算最优规模下随规模增大而收紧；5) 能预测多轮训练时的逐渐过拟合现象；6) 分离了数据集中可学习信息与不可预测的随机内容，发现低熵文本比高熵图像包含更多可学习结构。

Conclusion: Requential coding是一种全新的、与模型规模和熵无关的压缩方法，能更真实地反映模型学到的有用信息量，为大模型的泛化理论分析和可学习信息量化提供了有力工具，并在理论界限和实际压缩效果上均显著优于现有方法。

Abstract: Compression is fundamental to intelligence. A model that can represent its training data as a short code has discovered regularities that enable generalization. Large neural networks may learn functions far simpler than their parameter counts suggest, but it is challenging to construct codes that realize this simplicity. Parameter-based methods such as quantization produce code lengths that scale with model size, insensitive to how much information the parameters store. Prequential coding bypasses this issue by compressing the training trajectory, but codes the exact data sequence regardless of how much the model learns, yielding large codes when the data has high entropy. We introduce requential coding, where a teacher model selects training samples drawn from the student's own distribution. The student's code records only these selections, which cost bits only where teacher and student disagree. The resulting code length is independent of parameter count and data entropy, and often orders of magnitude shorter than the prequential counterpart, with an advantage that grows with scale. This compression sheds light on phenomena inaccessible to prior compressors. Holding loss fixed, larger models and ensembles compress to much smaller sizes despite more parameters. Plugged into a PAC-Bayes bound, the requential code yields state-of-the-art generalization guarantees for billion-parameter LLMs, outperforming bounds built on aggressive post-training quantization even granted zero error. The bound tightens with scale in the compute-optimal regime, as models become increasingly compressible relative to dataset size. The same code predicts that models gradually overfit when trained for multiple epochs. It also isolates the learnable information in a dataset from its unpredictable, random content, revealing that lower-entropy text holds far more learnable structure than higher-entropy image data.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [475] [EgoSteer: A Full-Stack System Towards Steerable Dexterous Manipulation from Egocentric Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09701)
*Yifan Zhong,Zhang Chen,Tianrui Guan,Fanlian Zeng,Yuyao Ye,Tianjia He,Ka Nam Lui,Jiayi Li,Tingrui Zhang,Ruilin Yan,Xinhao Ji,Guangyu Zhao,Wenjie Lou,Jiayuan Zhang,Yuanpei Chen,Yaodong Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了EgoSteer，一个全栈系统，通过从第一人称人类视频中扩展灵巧VLA预训练，解决了灵巧手系统缺乏可操控性的问题。该系统包含EgoSmith数据管道（将野外第一人称视频整理为9.6K小时高质量预训练数据，吞吐量提升9倍）、统一机器人遥操作与纠错栈，以及基于世界模型增强的VLA模型EgoSteer。人类数据预训练赋予语言引导的操作先验，通过机器人后训练和DAgger优化落地。在40+任务上展示了指令遵循、故障恢复和泛化能力，在两种机器人平台上箱体折叠等长时任务成功率达75%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵巧手机器人系统缺乏大规模、语言对齐且动作精确的演示数据，导致其缺乏通用机器人策略所具备的"可操控性"（Steerability）这一关键能力。

Method: 提出全栈系统EgoSteer，包含：(1) EgoSmith数据管道，从野外第一人称视频中高效整理9.6K小时高质量预训练数据；(2) 统一的机器人遥操作与人在环路纠错栈；(3) 基于世界模型增强的VLA模型，通过人类数据预训练获得语言引导的操作先验，再经机器人后训练和DAgger优化落地。

Result: 在40+不同任务上鲁棒执行自由形式指令，具备故障恢复、灵巧操作和泛化能力；预训练模型可在两种机器人主体上少样本适配复杂长时任务（如箱体折叠），成功率达75%以上。

Conclusion: 提出的全栈系统通过大规模第一人称人类视频预训练+机器人后训练的方式，有效解决了灵巧手系统缺乏可操控性的瓶颈，实现了数据高效的灵巧VLA策略学习，并开源了系统、数据和模型。

Abstract: Steerability is a defining capability of generalist robot policies, yet remains largely absent in dexterous-hand systems for lack of large-scale, language-aligned, and action-accurate demonstration data. To address this bottleneck, we present a full-stack system that scales dexterous VLA pre-training from egocentric human videos and enables data-efficient real-robot post-training. It integrates EgoSmith, a data pipeline that curates in-the-wild egocentric videos into 9.6K hours of high-quality pre-training data with 9x higher throughput and better accuracy than prior SOTA; a unified robot stack for teleoperation and human-in-the-loop correction; and EgoSteer, a world-model-enhanced VLA trained on optimized infrastructure. Human-data pre-training equips EgoSteer with language-guided manipulation priors, which are grounded through robot post-training and improved by DAgger refinement. Empirically, EgoSteer robustly executes free-form instructions across 40+ diverse tasks, demonstrating failure recovery, dexterity, and generalization. The pre-trained model also few-shot adapts to complex long-horizon tasks, including box folding, on two embodiments with 75+% success. We open-source the system, data, and model at https://egosteer.github.io/.

</details>


### [476] [RoboNav-Arm: Agentic AI-Driven Navigation and Obstacle Avoidance for Robotic Manipulator in Cluttered Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09716)
*Aachal Sharma,Narendra Kumar Dhar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向非结构化环境的机器人操控框架，通过实时障碍物检测与3D定位、地面几何估计、结构化语义报告生成、中央协调模块以及自适应运动规划算法选择，实现了安全的目标导向任务执行与避障，并在Gazebo仿真中验证了鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法依赖先验知识或固定感知管线，在动态、不可预见的非结构化环境中适应性有限，难以安全执行目标导向任务。

Method: 框架包含三个核心模块：环境模块（实时障碍物检测、3D定位、地面几何估计，生成结构化语义报告）、中央协调模块（工具调用、模块间通信、任务进度监控）、规划模块（根据环境配置与目标需求自适应选择RRTConnect、RRT*或BiTRRT等运动规划算法，并对轨迹进行细化分析以确保无碰撞）。

Result: 在Gazebo Classic仿真环境中进行了评估，在动态场景下表现出鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该框架通过环境感知与自适应规划的协同，有效提升了非结构化环境下机器人操控的安全性与适应性。

Abstract: Robotic manipulators operating in unstructured environments face significant challenges in safely executing goal-directed tasks due to dynamic and unforeseen obstacles, while traditional methods rely on prior knowledge or fixed perception pipelines, limiting adaptability. We propose a framework for safe task execution with effective obstacle avoidance. The environment module performs real-time obstacle detection, 3D localization, and ground surface geometry estimation. It then generates a structured semantic report that includes obstacle positions, object geometry and shape, and whether obstacles lie inside, outside, or within critical interaction zones. A central coordination module manages the overall system by handling tool invocation (e.g., memory and MoveIt collision scene updates), facilitating communication between modules, and continuously monitoring task progress until completion. Furthermore, a planning module selects an appropriate motion planning algorithm, such as RRTConnect, RRT*, or BiTRRT, based on the current environment configuration and goal requirements. The trajectory generated by the planner is further analyzed and refined to ensure safe and collision-free task execution. The proposed approach is evaluated in Gazebo Classic , demonstrating robustness in dynamic scenarios.

</details>


### [477] [Learning High-Level Decision Making with an Interaction-Aware Attention-Based Network in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09725)
*Marcelo Contreras,Willi Poh,Christoph Stiller,Ehsan Hashemi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出DecisionPerceiver架构，通过将动态智能体特征投影到固定大小的潜在空间，并采用更细粒度的动作离散化，实现可扩展的自动驾驶决策，在需要交互意识的场景中表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法如DeepSet忽视交通交互建模，受限性能；注意力方法虽能捕捉交互但存在二次复杂度和表示粒度控制问题。需要一种既能建模交互又能高效扩展的决策架构。

Method: 受Perceiver IO启发，提出DecisionPerceiver：1) 将动态智能体特征投影到固定大小的潜在空间，通过潜在查询数量调节表示粒度；2) 提出更细粒度的动作离散化方案以提升交互感知增益。

Result: 在三种需要不同交互意识水平的驾驶场景中均表现出一致的性能提升和泛化能力；在车辆数量递增的场景中验证了可扩展性。

Conclusion: DecisionPerceiver通过潜在空间投影解决了注意力方法的复杂度问题，同时保留了交互建模能力，细粒度动作离散化进一步提升了性能，为自动驾驶决策提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Reliable learning-based high-level decision making for lane changes and speed control in automated driving must accommodate dynamically sized inputs due to varying scene traffic flow. DeepSet and its variants represent the state of the art among shared-encoder approaches; however, they neglect explicit traffic interaction modeling, limiting performance in negotiation-intensive scenarios such as intersections. Attention-based methods capture interactions among static and dynamic agents, but incur quadratic memory and computational complexity and provide limited control over representation granularity. Inspired by Perceiver IO, an attention-based architecture, DecisionPerceiver, is proposed to project dynamic agent features into a fixed-size latent space, where feature granularity is regulated by the number of latent queries, improving scalability for larger networks. A finer discretization of the action set is further proposed to increase the performance gain due to interaction awareness. Extensive evaluations across three driving scenarios that require different levels of interaction awareness demonstrate consistent performance gains and generalization across various navigation objectives. In addition, the proposed architecture is assessed in scenarios with an increasing number of vehicles to demonstrate scalability.

</details>


### [478] [Saturation-Aware Robust Trajectory Optimization for Reusable Launch Vehicles via Differentiable Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09736)
*Liwei Chen,Tong Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可微物理粒子管控制（DPTC）框架，通过集成可微物理、粒子系综分布塑形和硬执行器饱和约束，实现了高升力再入飞行器大迎角翻转机动的鲁棒轨迹优化。与AD-SCvx基线相比，DPTC在存在气动不确定性和执行器饱和时能够主动进行约束感知的性能权衡，在保持关键控制权限的同时牺牲空间跟踪精度，显著提升了闭环鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可重复使用运载火箭在大迎角翻转机动中面临强非线性动力学、气动不确定性和执行器饱和的耦合挑战，现有方法难以同时兼顾轨迹最优性与面对饱和时的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出了可微粒子管控制（DPTC）框架：使用拉格朗日粒子系综表示状态不确定性，通过系综分布塑形策略优化不确定性演化；将硬执行器投影算子嵌入计算图，实现标称前馈轨迹与时变反馈策略的端到端联合反向传播优化。

Result: 六自由度蒙特卡洛仿真表明：AD-SCvx基线虽能获得标称燃料最优解，但其无约束反馈在气动扰动下易受执行器饱和影响，导致闭环鲁棒性下降；DPTC通过主动放松空间跟踪以保留关键控制权限，实现了约束感知的性能权衡。

Conclusion: 将可微物理与基于系综的优化相结合，为高约束航空航天飞行系统的鲁棒制导提供了有效且实用的框架。

Abstract: The high-angle-of-attack flip maneuver of reusable launch vehicles presents significant challenges for robust trajectory optimization due to the combined effects of highly nonlinear dynamics, aerodynamic uncertainties, and actuator saturation. This paper presents a differentiable physics framework for saturation-aware robust trajectory optimization. At its core, a Differentiable Particle Tube Control (DPTC) scheme is developed to optimize uncertainty evolution through an ensemble-based distribution shaping strategy. State uncertainty is represented by a Lagrangian particle ensemble, while hard actuator projection operators are embedded directly into the computational graph, enabling the joint optimization of the nominal feedforward trajectory and a time-varying feedback policy via end-to-end backpropagation. The proposed framework is evaluated against an automatic differentiation-based Successive Convexification (AD-SCvx) baseline combined with a conventional covariance steering feedback strategy. Six-degree-of-freedom Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that, although the baseline achieves nominal fuel-optimal solutions, its unconstrained feedback formulation becomes susceptible to actuator saturation under aerodynamic disturbances, leading to degraded closed-loop robustness. In contrast, the proposed DPTC framework proactively performs a constraint-aware performance trade-off by relaxing spatial tracking to preserve critical control authority. These results demonstrate that integrating differentiable physics with ensemble-based optimization provides an effective and practical framework for robust guidance in highly constrained aerospace flight systems.

</details>


### [479] [SWIFT: A Small-World Interaction Framework for Flow-Aware Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09741)
*Chengyue Wang,Bin Rao,Haicheng Liao,Bonan Wang,Chengzhong Xu,Zhenning Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SWIFT是一个结合小世界网络与交通流理论的轨迹预测框架，通过结构先验提升了预测准确性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法纯数据驱动，缺乏结构先验，导致分布偏移下泛化能力受限。

Method: 提出SWIFT框架，包含小世界交互网络（捕获局部与全局依赖）、流态编码器（适应场景级交通状态）和多关系图模块（编码直接与高阶代理关系）。

Result: 在nuScenes、MoCAD和NGSIM三个数据集上，SWIFT在预测精度上持续优于强基线，并展现出更好的泛化性、鲁棒性和小样本学习能力。

Conclusion: 结构感知的交互建模能有效提升轨迹预测的准确性和泛化能力，验证了引入交通网络结构先验的有效性。

Abstract: Accurate trajectory prediction in autonomous driving hinges on modeling dynamic and context-dependent interactions among traffic agents. However, most existing approaches are purely data-driven and lack structural priors, which limits their generalization under distribution shifts. In this work, interaction modeling is revisited through the structure and dynamics of traffic networks, and SWIFT (Small-World Interaction Framework for Trajectory prediction) is proposed as a unified framework that integrates small-world networks with traffic flow theory. SWIFT introduces structural inductive biases via a Small-World Interaction Network that captures both local and global dependencies, and a Flow Regime Encoder that adapts the interaction structure to scene-level traffic states. Interaction reasoning is further enhanced through a multi-relational graph module that explicitly encodes direct and higher-order agent relationships. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets, nuScenes, MoCAD, and NGSIM, show that SWIFT consistently outperforms strong baselines in prediction accuracy across diverse traffic regimes. Beyond accuracy, SWIFT exhibits improved generalization to unseen locations and regimes, robustness under noisy observations, and strong performance with limited training data, supporting the effectiveness of its structure-aware design.

</details>


### [480] [LLM-Centric Agentic AI for UAV Swarms: Architecture, Enabling Technologies, and Open Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09756)
*Yousef Emami,Rahim Taheri,Mohammadhossein Homaei,Muhammad Atif Ur Rehman,Mohammad Shojafar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LAUS框架，将基于LLM的Agentic AI应用于无人机集群，整合感知、记忆、推理/规划与行动以实现自适应、目标导向的集群行为，并分析了优先操纵攻击等安全威胁及开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机集群在实际部署中面临态势感知不足、连接间歇性和网络安全风险等限制，亟需一种能够实现自主、自适应集群操作的统一架构。

Method: 提出LLM-Centric Agentic AI for UAV Swarms (LAUS)框架，将大语言模型置于闭环认知架构中心，整合感知、记忆、推理/规划与行动模块；综述了机载/边缘计算、5G/6G连接、多模态智能和网络安全等关键技术。

Result: 识别了优先操纵攻击(PMA)等可扭曲决策并降低网络性能的新型攻击方式，同时指出扩展的攻击面相较于传统AI系统有所增加。

Conclusion: 确定了三个开放研究挑战：抗幻觉推理、在SWaP约束下部署机载LLM、以及针对Agentic无人机系统中感知-推理攻击的标准化安全基准。

Abstract: Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms have significant potential for applications such as Search and Rescue (SAR) and environmental monitoring, but their real-world deployment is limited by a lack of situational awareness, intermittent connectivity, and significant cybersecurity risks. Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) represents a shift from standalone Large Language Model (LLM) toward closed-loop cognitive architectures that integrate perception, memory, reasoning/planning, and action to enable adaptive, goal-directed swarm behavior. Within this framework, Agentic AI provides a unifying structure for autonomous and adaptive swarm operations while expanding the system attack surface compared to conventional AI systems. This paper proposes LLM-Centric Agentic AI for UAV Swarms (LAUS) and reviews key enabling technologies such as onboard and edge computing, 5G/6G connectivity, multimodal intelligence, and cybersecurity mechanisms, and analyzes threats such as Priority Manipulation Attacks (PMA) that can distort decision-making and degrade network performance. Finally, it identifies open research challenges, including hallucination-resistant reasoning, onboard LLM deployment under SWaP constraints, and standardized security benchmarks for perception-reasoning attacks in agentic UAV systems.

</details>


### [481] [OmniSCS: Omni Safety-Critical Scenario Synthesis for Autonomous Driving via a Fully Editable Driving World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09764)
*Xiaoyun Dong,Qian Xu,Yang Lu,Yang Lou,Yung-Hui Li,Jianping Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OmniSCS是一个创新系统，通过双策略智能体重建和深度精化背景重建方法，在场景编辑中保持高保真度，并支持闭环测试，在nuScenes、Waymo和KITTI数据集上优于现有方法，能以13Hz实时运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在编辑安全关键场景后难以保持数据保真度，且无法高效生成高质量SCS，亟需一个既能进行场景编辑又能保持物理逼真度的解决方案。

Method: OmniSCS包含两个关键模块：1）全可编辑驾驶世界构建模块，通过双策略智能体重建和深度精化背景重建保持高保真度；2）SCS合成模块，支持对象插入和轨迹编辑以合成多样化SCS。

Result: 在nuScenes、Waymo和KITTI数据集上，OmniSCS在编辑场景保真度方面优于现有方法，并能以13Hz频率支持实时闭环测试，提升自动驾驶算法性能。

Conclusion: OmniSCS为自动驾驶中的安全关键场景优化与测试提供了更安全、有效且成本效益更高的解决方案。

Abstract: The synthesis of safety-critical scenarios (SCS) and their evaluation through closed-loop simulations are crucial for developing robust autonomous driving systems. A key aspect of this process involves editing agent states in both appearance and trajectory levels within existing scenes. However, current methods struggle to preserve data fidelity after scene editing and fail to efficiently generate high-quality SCS through such modifications. To overcome these limitations, we propose OmniSCS, an innovative system that generates photorealistic SCS with high physical fidelity while enabling closed-loop testing in synthetic environments. OmniSCS comprises two key modules: 1) A Fully Editable Driving World Construction module that maintains high-fidelity agent appearance and background during scene editing via dual-strategy agent reconstruction and depth-refinement background reconstruction methods. 2) A SCS Synthesis module that facilitates object insertion and agent trajectory editing to synthesize diverse SCS while preserving data fidelity. Experiments on nuScenes, Waymo, and KITTI datasets show that OmniSCS outperforms state-of-the-art methods in edited scene fidelity. We further validate its ability to enhance autonomous driving algorithms and support real-time (13Hz) closed-loop testing. Overall, OmniSCS provides a safer, more effective, and cost-efficient solution for SCS optimization and testing in autonomous driving.

</details>


### [482] [A Risk-Field Enhanced Closed-Loop Digital Twin Framework for Autonomous Driving Safety Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09772)
*Yongzhi Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种风险场增强的闭环数字孪生框架，用于自动驾驶安全验证。该框架将物理数据采集、虚拟孪生重建、风险感知场景生成和算法评估集成一体，通过驾驶风险场作为统一中间表示来识别高风险场景并指导强化学习策略，使验证更具针对性、可解释性和可复用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶系统在现实部署前需要可靠的安全验证，但大规模路测成本高、难以复现且对稀有安全关键场景暴露效率低；传统离线仿真虽提升了可重复性，但无法连续连接物理交通状态、虚拟重建、算法评估和场景演化等环节。

Method: 构建风险场增强的闭环数字孪生框架，包含物理数据采集、数据同步、虚拟孪生重建、风险感知场景生成、自动驾驶算法评估和安全分析。引入驾驶风险场作为统一中间表示，描述自车周围的碰撞、车道偏离、道路边界、碰撞时间和舒适度相关风险，用于对数字孪生场景库中的高风险场景排序，并为强化学习驾驶策略提供密集安全引导。

Result: 设计了仿真风格评估协议，对比了常规强化学习基线、风险惩罚基线和所提出的风险场引导方法。研究表明，将显式风险结构嵌入数字孪生可使自动驾驶验证更具针对性、可解释性和可复用性。

Conclusion: 所提框架的有效性受限于模型保真度、风险校准和仿真到现实迁移等因素。

Abstract: Autonomous driving systems require reliable safety validation before real-world deployment. However, large-scale road testing is costly, difffcult to reproduce, and inefffcient for exposing rare safety-critical scenarios. Conventional simulation improves repeatability, but an offfine simulator alone cannot continuously connect physical trafffc states, virtual reconstruction, algorithm evaluation, and scenario evolution. This paper proposes a risk-ffeld enhanced closed-loop digital twin framework for autonomous driving safety validation. The framework integrates physical data acquisition, data synchronization, virtual twin reconstruction, risk-aware scenario generation, autonomous driving algorithm evaluation, and safety analysis. A driving risk ffeld is introduced as a uniffed intermediate representation to describe obstacle, lane-departure, road-boundary, time-to-collision, and comfort-related risks around the ego vehicle. The risk ffeld ranks high-risk scenarios in the digital twin scenario library and provides dense safety guidance for reinforcement learning-based driving policies. A simulation-style evaluation protocol is designed to compare conventional reinforcement learning baselines, risk-penalty baselines, and the proposed risk-ffeld guided method. The study indicates that embedding explicit risk structure into digital twins can make autonomous driving validation more targeted, interpretable, and reusable, while its practical effectiveness remains bounded by model ffdelity, risk calibration, and sim-to-real transfer.

</details>


### [483] [Maximizing Human Efficiency in Large-Scale Robot Post-Training via VLAC-Cut Guided Pipeline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09776)
*Shaopeng Zhai,Qi Zhang,Tianyi Zhang,Haoran Zhang,Fuxian Huang,Zhanhui Lin,Zijun Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效利用人类劳动力的VLA模型后训练流水线，通过角色分工（远程操作员+现场操作员）和自动滚选工具VLAC-CUT，在四个真实操作任务上将策略成功率提升至80%-95%，任务吞吐量提升1.7-4.2倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在下游任务适配时需要多轮后训练迭代以逐步修复前一轮暴露的缺陷，但这一过程高度依赖人类劳动。现有方法中单轮数据无法解决所有问题，且人工监督多台机器人时存在任务切换成本高、训练成本大等效率瓶颈。因此，如何最大化单位人力和时间投入下的策略改进与任务吞吐量成为核心问题。

Method: 提出一种人机协同的后训练流水线：(1) 专业化分工：训练有素的远程操作员负责高价值的远程干预和恢复演示，现场操作员监控多台机器人、触发接管并执行物理重置，减少任务切换并降低培训成本；(2) 自动滚选工具VLAC-CUT：将自主机器人轨迹分割为进展、空闲、失败诱导和恢复四类，保留有用片段，过滤有害或无信息片段；(3) 将筛选后的滚选数据与人在环数据合并用于下一轮训练。

Result: 在四个真实操作任务的多轮迭代后训练中，最终策略达到80%-95%的成功率，任务吞吐量相比基础模型提升1.7-4.2倍。在相同人工干预预算下，VLAC-CUT引导的滚选复用策略在成功率和吞吐量上均优于仅用人在环数据的方法。

Conclusion: 通过专业化角色分工和自动数据筛选，可以在有限人力下有效监督更多机器人，提升后训练阶段的人类效率和策略性能。VLAC-CUT作为自动滚选工具，能够显著提高数据利用效率，为VLA模型的大规模部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: When adapting Vision Language Action (VLA) models to downstream tasks, multiple rounds of post training are required because a single round of data cannot resolve all issues, making continuous iterations necessary to progressively address the weaknesses exposed in previous rounds. In this report, we aim to maximize human efficiency during post-training, defined as the policy improvement and task throughput achieved per unit of human labor and time.
  We propose a human-efficient post-training pipeline that enables a small number of human operators to supervise multiple robots. The pipeline is built around a specialized division of labor: a trained Teleoperator focuses on high-value remote interventions and recovery demonstrations, while a Floor Operator monitors multiple robots, triggers takeovers, and performs physical resets. This role specialization reduces task switching, lowers operator training costs, and allows limited human labor to supervise more robot interaction across a larger fleet. To improve data utilization efficiency, we introduce VLAC-CUT as an automatic rollout curation tool. It segments autonomous robot trajectories into progress-making, idle, failure-inducing, and recovery portions, preserving useful segments while filtering harmful or uninformative ones. The curated rollout data are combined with Human-in-the-Loop data for the next post-training round. We validate the proposed pipeline on four real-world manipulation tasks. Across iterative post-training rounds, the final policies achieve 80\%--95\% success rates and improve task throughput by 1.7$\times$--4.2$\times$ over the base model. Under the same human-intervention budget, VLAC-CUT guided rollout reuse outperforms HITL-only training in both success rate and throughput.

</details>


### [484] [A Comprehensive Survey and Systematic Real-World Evaluation of Embodied Vision-and-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09792)
*Liuyi Wang,Kai Sheng,Zongtao He,Jinlong Li,Yongrui Qin,Haojie Dai,Xiangyi Wang,Jingwei Yang,Qingqing Yan,Chengju Liu,Qijun Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了视觉与语言导航（VLN）领域的研究现状，从动作范式（层次化 vs. 单一框架）和模型范式（判别式 vs. 生成式）两个维度对现有方法进行分类分析，并通过真实机器人平台实验揭示了仿真与真实部署之间的显著性能差距（如单一RGB方法在仿真中成功率达61%，真实场景仅22%），最后指出了感知、决策与控制方面的关键挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有导航方法依赖高度结构化模型和强先验假设，在开放、不确定的真实环境中鲁棒性不足。VLN虽提供了数据驱动的自然语言与视觉融合方向，但缺乏系统的方法论分类和真实世界验证，亟需系统梳理和评估。

Method: 采用二维分类体系：（1）动作范式：层次化框架与单一框架；（2）模型范式：判别式方法与生成式方法。同时构建物理机器人平台，在10个真实场景中对代表性VLN系统进行系统化真实世界评估。

Result: 代表性单一RGB方法在仿真中成功率达61%，但在真实部署中仅22%；层次化框架在真实环境中成功率达51%，表现出更强的鲁棒性，揭示了仿真与真实部署间的显著性能差距。

Conclusion: VLN在真实环境中仍面临感知、决策与控制方面的关键挑战，层次化框架在鲁棒性上优于单一方法，未来需弥合仿真到真实部署的鸿沟。

Abstract: Navigation is a fundamental capability of autonomous systems, yet most existing approaches rely on highly structured models and strong prior assumptions, limiting their robustness in open and uncertain real-world environments. Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) offers a promising direction by enabling robots to integrate natural language understanding with visual perception in a data-driven manner. Although VLN has attracted increasing research attention, systematic methodological taxonomy and real-world validation remain limited. This survey presents a comprehensive review of VLN research. Specifically, state-of-the-art methods are organized along two orthogonal dimensions: action paradigms, including hierarchical and monolithic frameworks, and model paradigms, including discriminative and generative approaches. A critical analysis of their respective strengths and limitations is provided. Additionally, we conduct a systematic real-world evaluation of representative VLN system configurations on a physical robotic platform. Experiments across ten diverse real-world scenes show a substantial performance gap between simulation and real-world deployment under the tested configurations: a representative monolithic RGB-only method achieves 61% success in simulation but drops to 22% in real-world deployment, while a hierarchical framework achieves a higher real-world success rate of 51%, suggesting stronger robustness in our evaluation setting. Finally, we highlight key challenges in perception, decision-making, and control that must be addressed in future research.

</details>


### [485] [A Biomimetic Myoelectric Tentacle Prosthesis with Sensorless Object Detection and Vibrotactile Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09807)
*Gabrielle Marion,Olivier Lecompte,Amandine Gesta,Abolfazl Mohebbi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文设计并评估了一种基于肌电控制、无传感器物体检测和振动触觉反馈的触手形假肢，实现了低延迟（平均77ms）、高物体检测成功率（>90%）和有效的触觉反馈，展示了超越传统仿人形态的仿生假肢新思路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种响应灵敏、直观易用的辅助设备，能够自适应不同形状的物体，并为用户提供感觉反馈，同时探索超越传统仿人形态的假肢设计范式。

Method: 采用对数螺旋曲线的柔性仿生触手结构，通过EMG信号归一化与阈值方法控制运动；利用电机电流斜率分析实现无传感器物体接触检测；采用累积振动触觉刺激策略传递触手构型空间信息。

Result: 平均响应时间77ms，实现平滑实时交互；物体检测成功率超过90%，对EMG变异性具有鲁棒性；用户能够可靠识别触手的折叠区域，触觉反馈策略有效。

Conclusion: 所提出的仿生设计优先考虑表达性功能而非遵循预定义的类人形态，为更具表现力的人工肢体研究提供了新方向。

Abstract: This paper presents the design and evaluation of a myoelectric tentacle-shaped prosthesis integrating electromyographic (EMG) control, sensorless object detection, and vibrotactile feedback. The objective was to develop a responsive and intuitive assistive device that adapts to various object shapes while providing sensory feedback to the user. The system relies on EMG signals to control the motion of a flexible, biomimetic structure whose curling geometry follows a logarithmic spiral, enabling it to coil around objects. To ensure stable control, the EMG signal is normalized and filtered, and a threshold-based method identifies user intention. Object contact is detected through a slope-based analysis of motor current, eliminating the need for external sensors, and a haptic feedback strategy based on cumulative vibrotactile stimulation conveys spatial information about the tentacle's configuration. The system was evaluated through quantitative and qualitative tests. The results demonstrate a low response time (77 ms on average), enabling smooth real-time interaction; an object-detection success rate above 90%, confirming robustness despite EMG variability; and an effective haptic feedback strategy that allowed users to reliably identify the folding zone of the tentacle. The proposed biomimetic design promotes further investigation of expressive artificial limbs by prioritizing expressive functionality over adherence to a predefined, anthropomorphic form factor.

</details>


### [486] [RASR: Range-Aware Scale Recovery for Metric UAV Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09815)
*Hongtao Liang,Xinyu Shao,Chenxu Wang,Yiyao Wan,Jiahuan Ji,Fangwei Ye,Fuhui Zhou,Qihui Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Range-Aware Scale Recovery (RASR)方法，通过将可迁移的尺度恢复核心与协议特定的校准模块分离，在GNSS拒止环境下为UAV提供精确的米级最后导航能力，在PairUAV在线评估中达到0.003189的总分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在GNSS拒止环境下，UAV控制器需要精确的距离和航向指令。现有的稠密对几何基础模型在迁移相对结构方面表现良好，但其原始度量输出的距离尺度校准不佳，仅校正平均尺度在接近目标时仍会留下代价高昂的距离相关残差。

Method: RASR将可迁移的尺度恢复核心与协议特定的校准模块分离。核心部分压缩冻结的MASt3R风格几何特征为紧凑描述符，并利用全局校准恢复主要度量信号；校准模块包含距离桶残差校正和指令网格对齐，匹配PairUAV的命令格式和评估协议。整个系统在推理时固定。

Result: 在UAVs in Multimedia 2026 PairUAV在线评估中，RASR达到0.003189的总分。

Conclusion: 冻结的对几何在PairUAV协议下能产生稳定的每对距离和航向估计，所有协议特定的调整都限定在推理前固定的校准模块内，验证了模块化设计在度量尺度恢复中的有效性。

Abstract: Under Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) denial, a UAV controller still needs a distance and heading command it can execute, making accurate metric last-meter navigation essential. Dense pair-geometry foundation models transfer relative structure well, yet the distance scale of their raw metric outputs remains poorly calibrated. Under the relative error metric of PairUAV, correcting only the average scale can still leave costly, distance-dependent residuals near the goal. To address this scale mismatch, Range-Aware Scale Recovery (RASR) separates a transferable scale-recovery core from a protocol-specific calibration module in a per-pair system fixed at inference. The core compresses frozen Matching And Stereo 3D Reconstruction (MASt3R)-style geometry into a compact descriptor and uses global calibration to recover the dominant metric signal. Range-bucket residual correction and command-grid alignment stay inside the calibration module, so they match the command format and evaluation protocol of PairUAV. On the UAVs in Multimedia 2026 PairUAV online evaluation, RASR reaches a total score of 0.003189. Under the PairUAV protocol, frozen pair geometry thus yields stable per-pair distance and heading estimates, while every protocol-specific adjustment stays confined to a calibration module fixed before inference. Code and materials are available at https://github.com/lht-research/rasr-pairuav.

</details>


### [487] [TS-Mask VLA: 2D Temporal-Spatial Masking for Vision-Language-Action Model with Effective Bridging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09818)
*Shengzhuo Yang,Ronghao Yu,Chuanjie Lv,Linpeng Peng,Hang Yu,Jie Ren,Jiajun Lv,Yong Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出TS-Mask VLA框架，通过离散扩散动作专家和时序-空间2D掩码策略，在机器人操作任务中以0.5B参数实现95.7%成功率，超越更大规模模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归token式动作生成将动作简化为下一个词预测，缺乏对动作序列时空结构的显式建模以及视觉-语言表征与动作的解耦，限制了长时域和复杂场景下的性能。

Method: (1) 离散扩散动作专家 + 桥接注意力条件桥，实现VLM多层条件注入；(2) 时序-空间2D掩码策略，强化跨时间依赖和跨维度耦合建模。

Result: LIBERO基准上0.5B参数达到95.7%平均成功率；CALVIN上达到4.19最佳平均序列长度，长时域任务表现优异。

Conclusion: TS-Mask VLA通过扩散生成和结构掩码有效提升了动作生成的准确性和结构一致性，验证了设计的有效性。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models aim to understand natural-language instructions and visual observations, and to generate and execute corresponding actions as embodied agents. Recently, autoregressive token-based action generation has driven the development of many representative VLA models. However, this paradigm often reduces action generation to next-token prediction, thereby lacking explicit modeling of the spatiotemporal structure of action sequences and the disentanglement between vision-language representations and actions, which can limit performance in long-horizon and complex scenarios. In this paper, we propose TS-Mask VLA, a vision-language-action framework for robot manipulation. TS-Mask VLA is built upon two key designs: (1) a Discrete Diffusion Action Expert equipped with a Bridge Attention conditioning bridge, which enables multi-layer conditioning from the VLM and facilitates more accurate and stable action generation; and (2) a temporal-spatial 2D masking strategy for discrete action tokens that strengthens the model's understanding of cross-time dependencies and inter-dimensional coupling, leading to more structurally consistent action sequences. We conduct extensive experiments on simulation benchmarks and real-world tasks. On LIBERO, TS-Mask VLA achieves a 95.7 percent average success rate with only 0.5B parameters, outperforming significantly larger models. On CALVIN, it attains the best average sequence length of 4.19 and strong long-horizon performance. Comprehensive analyses and ablations further validate the effectiveness of our design.

</details>


### [488] [More Structure, Not More Capacity: Object-Centric Representations for Visuomotor Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09825)
*Yi Li,Alexandre Chapin,Liming Chen,Jan Peters,Alap Kshirsagar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究物体中心化槽位表示（object-centric slot representations）在机器人操作策略中的作用。在ManiSkill3 PickCube-v1任务中，使用冻结的SPOT表示（DINO ViT-B/16 + Slot Attention）达到55.0%的成功率，比密集DINO全局特征基线（32.6%）高出22.4个百分点。添加显式2D空间目标和原生分辨率渲染后，系统达到68.7%，接近特权3D预言机上限（71.7%）。通过自动化运动学失败分类，发现空间接地减少了Near-Miss失败而对No-Grasp无影响，该分类可迁移到StackCube-v1任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作策略依赖的视觉模型要么提供全局场景嵌入，要么提供密集补丁网格，两者都混合了任务相关和任务无关的特征。物体中心化槽位表示作为一种结构化替代方案，能将特征分组为每个物体的几个槽位，可能解决上述问题。

Method: 在ManiSkill3 PickCube-v1任务上进行受控实验，固定策略、目标token、渲染和标定，仅改变编码器。比较物体中心化SPOT表示（DINO ViT-B/16 + Slot Attention）与密集DINO全局特征基线、密集补丁网格的效果。添加显式2D空间目标和原生分辨率渲染。设计自动化运动学失败分类（Near-Miss和No-Grasp）分析失败模式。

Result: 冻结的SPOT表示达到55.0±2.9%成功率，比密集DINO全局特征基线（32.6±1.5%）高22.4个百分点。密集补丁网格即使有16倍token数也不优于全局特征。添加2D空间目标和原生分辨率渲染后系统达到68.7±4.2%，接近3D预言机上限（71.7±4.1%）。空间接地减少Near-Miss失败，但不影响No-Grasp失败。该分类可迁移到StackCube-v1。

Conclusion: 物体中心化槽位表示能有效分离任务相关与无关特征，显著提升操作策略性能。空间接地针对性地解决了空间精度问题，但物体跟踪（尤其是遮挡场景）仍是主要瓶颈。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation policies rely on pre-trained vision models that give either a global scene embedding or a dense patch grid. Both mix task-relevant and task-irrelevant features. Object-centric slot representations are a structured alternative: they group features into a few per-object slots. We test what this structure buys on ManiSkill3 PickCube-v1, with a frozen encoder and a held-out-seed evaluation. Holding the policy, goal token, rendering, and calibration fixed and changing only the encoder, a frozen object-centric SPOT representation (DINO ViT-B/16 + Slot Attention) reaches 55.0$\pm$2.9% success, 22.4% above a dense DINO global-feature baseline (32.6 $\pm$ 1.5%), with the same trainable policy and no encoder fine-tuning. More tokens alone do not help: a dense patch grid with 16x the tokens performs no better than the global feature. Adding an explicit 2D spatial goal and native-resolution rendering raises the full system to 68.7$\pm$4.2%, just below a privileged 3D-oracle upper bound (71.7$\pm$4.1%). An automated kinematic failure taxonomy then separates spatial-precision (Near-Miss) failures from object-tracking (No-Grasp) failures: spatial grounding reduces Near-Miss while leaving No- Grasp unchanged. The same taxonomy transfers to the harder StackCube-v1 and points to occlusion as the main bottleneck.

</details>


### [489] [Robo-ValueRL: Reliable Value Estimation for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09866)
*Wenke Xia,Pei Ren,Wenbo Yu,Yizhuo Zhang,Jifan Li,Yixue Zhang,Yinuo Zhao,Qingyang Gao,Jianlong Fu,Jian Tang,Ji-Rong Wen,Zhengping Che,Di Hu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Robo-ValueRL框架，通过历史条件值函数估计和可靠性度量（全局进度与局部偏好），系统研究了值函数可靠性如何影响离线到在线强化学习中的策略预训练与在线提升。实验表明，可靠的值估计显著提升策略性能，在毫米级精密芯片插入任务上达86%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线和在线强化学习的全栈系统复杂性使得复现和诊断困难，值函数可靠性如何影响策略优化这一核心问题尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出Robo-ValueRL框架：(1) 学习历史条件值函数估计器，通过全局进度和局部偏好指标评估可靠性；(2) 将可靠值估计传播到质量条件一致性策略预训练和残差适应模块中，形成统一测试平台。

Result: 在240小时离线演示和3000+在线轨迹上验证，下游性能与值可靠性强相关。可靠值函数在芯片插入任务达86%成功率，通用模块拆卸任务达84%成功率。

Conclusion: 值函数可靠性是离线到在线强化学习的关键因素，可靠值估计能有效引导数据利用，实现从异构机器人经验中高效策略改进。

Abstract: Offline-to-online reinforcement learning is promising for generalizable robotic manipulation, yet its full-stack complexity obscures reproduction and diagnosis. Within such systems, value estimation plays a central role in prioritizing heterogeneous data for policy improvement. Despite its importance, the central question remains underexplored: how value-function reliability shapes policy optimization in offline-to-online reinforcement learning. To answer this question, we propose Robo-ValueRL, a unified framework that enables reliable value estimation and systematically traces its downstream effects on policy pretraining and online improvement. Concretely, Robo-ValueRL learns a history-conditioned value estimator and evaluates its reliability through global-progress and local-preference metrics. These resulting value estimates are propagated into quality-conditioned consistency-policy pretraining and a residual adaptation module on online rollouts, providing a unified testbed for analyzing how value reliability shapes downstream policy performance. Across 240 hours of offline demonstrations and over 3,000 online rollout trajectories, our extensive experiments show that downstream performance is strongly associated with value reliability. Reliable value functions provide better action-quality estimates, allowing value-guided offline RL to scale more effectively than quality-agnostic behavior cloning, and stabilize online improvement by prioritizing high-quality rollout data. Integrating reliable value guidance through offline pretraining with online improvement, our system achieves 86% success on millimeter-level precise chip insertion and 84% on generalizable block disassembly. We hope these findings highlight the importance of value-guided data utilization for effective policy improvement from heterogeneous robotic experience.

</details>


### [490] [Diffusion for Long-Horizon Multi-Robot Path Planning in Human-Shared Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09911)
*Vaibhav Sanjay,Yorai Shaoul,Jiaoyang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MRRD是一个结合滚动时域、并行扩散推理和冲突搜索的框架，实现了15台机器人在密集人群中实时、长时域、社会感知的多机器人路径规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型规划的路径时长固定、计算延迟高，难以适应不同目标距离和实时部署需求，亟需一种兼顾鲁棒协调与社会感知的实时多机器人路径规划方法。

Method: 采用滚动时域方案适应有限的人类运动预测范围；并行化扩散推理实现类人路径的可扩展生成；基于冲突的搜索机制解决机器人间碰撞；引入基于紧迫性的时间调节生成变速度路径；使用差异化引导项最大化对人类的社会意识与机器人间的高效协调。

Result: 在拥挤环境中成功扩展到15台机器人实时运行，在安全性和任务成功率上显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: MRRD实现了密集人群下多机器人编队的实时、长时域、社会感知导航，证明了滚动扩散范式在机器人路径规划中的有效性。

Abstract: Multi-robot path planning in human-shared environments requires a delicate balance between robust inter-robot coordination and socially aware behavior. While diffusion models excel at generating predictable, human-like paths, existing generative planners are often restricted to paths of fixed duration and high computational latency, limiting their adaptability to varying goal distances and hindering real-time deployment. We present Multi-Robot Rolling Diffusion (MRRD), a novel framework that enables real-time, long-horizon navigation for large robot teams through dense crowds. MRRD combines a rolling-horizon scheme to accommodate the limited prediction horizon of human motion, parallelized diffusion inference for scalable generation of human-like paths, and a conflict-based-search mechanism for resolving inter-robot collisions. It further incorporates urgency-based temporal conditioning to generate paths with varying speeds and employs differentiated guidance terms to maximize both social awareness around humans and efficient coordination between robots. Experimental results in crowded environments demonstrate that MRRD successfully scales to 15 robots in real-time, significantly outperforming existing baselines in both safety and mission success rates.

</details>


### [491] [A Numerically-Robust ROS 2 Port of iG-LIO: Diagnosing and Fixing Toolchain-Induced Failures in Incremental GICP LiDAR-Inertial Odometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09947)
*Afonso E. Carvalho,David Portugal,Paulo Peixoto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文介绍了iG-LIO的ROS 2 Jazzy移植版本，诊断了移植后出现的由现代ROS 2工具链引起的数值发散问题（QoS不匹配导致IMU数据丢失乱序，以及oneTBB+Eigen组合导致累加器未初始化），并修复了Ouster点云解析、添加了Velodyne Velarray M1600支持、提供了Livox双路径支持，在多种激光雷达上完成了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将iG-LIO从ROS 1移植到ROS 2 Jazzy，并诊断和解决移植过程中出现的环境诱导的数值失效问题。

Method: 对原始iG-LIO算法数学部分不做改动，仅进行ROS 2工具链适配：修复QoS配置以解决IMU数据丢失乱序，修复oneTBB+Eigen并行归约累加器未初始化问题，修正Ouster点字段解析，添加Velodyne Velarray M1600支持，提供Livox双路径支持（编译时开关CustomMsg和标准PointCloud2模式）。

Result: 成功完成ROS 2移植，修复了由工具链引起的NaN发散问题，在Ouster OS0 Rev7、Ouster OS1 Rev 7和Livox MID-360上完成了验证，发布了开源代码。

Conclusion: 本报告是移植工作的可引用参考，而非对底层算法[1]的改进声明；ROS 2工具链的细微变化（QoS、并行库兼容性）可能导致算法层面的数值失效，需谨慎处理。

Abstract: iG-LIO is a tightly-coupled LiDAR-inertial odometry system fusing generalized-ICP and point-to-plane constraints in an iterated error-state Kalman filter over an incremental voxel map. We report an open-source ROS 2 Jazzy port of the original ROS 1 implementation and, more importantly, the diagnosis of environment-induced numerical failures that appear only after the port: a mechanically faithful migration -- estimation mathematics left unchanged -- compiled and ran, yet diverged with NaN internal values.
